Official Notification & Apply Online Click Here
Official Website Click Here

(FAQs)

Q1: What is the last date to apply for the MP Apex Bank recruitment?

The last date to submit the online application is February 05, 2026.

Q2: How many posts are available in this recruitment?

There are a total of 1763 posts for Computer Operator and Society Manager combined.

Q3: Can I apply for this recruitment offline?

No, the notification clearly states that applications will only be accepted through the online mode on the official website. No other means/mode of application will be accepted.

Q4: What is the educational qualification for the Society Manager post?

The detailed educational qualifications have not been provided in the initial notice. Candidates must refer to the full, detailed advertisement which will be available on the official website, www.apexbankmp.bank.in, on or after January 06, 2026.

entry.title: Bihar Vidhan Parishad Recruitment 2025: Apply Online for DEO, LDC, Stenographer & PA Posts
entry.content:
Bihar Vidhan Parishad Recruitment 2025: Apply Online for DEO, LDC, Stenographer & PA Posts

The Bihar Legislative Council Secretariat, Patna, has released Advertisement No. 02/2025 for direct recruitment to the posts of Data Entry Operator (DEO), Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Stenographer, and Personal Assistant.

A golden opportunity has emerged for the youth preparing for government jobs in Bihar. The Bihar Legislative Council Secretariat (BLCS) has released its official recruitment notification (Advertisement No. 02/2025) for the year 2025. Through this recruitment drive, vacant posts of Personal Assistant (PA), Stenographer, Data Entry Operator (DEO), and Lower Division Clerk (LDC) will be filled in the secretariat.

This recruitment is particularly attractive for candidates who are 12th pass or graduates and possess computer typing and shorthand skills. Selected candidates will get the opportunity to work in the prestigious Vidhan Parishad Secretariat located in Patna. The online application process will start on November 28, 2025, and candidates can submit their applications until December 19, 2025. This comprehensive article will guide you through all the important details of this recruitment.

Recruitment Overview

ParticularsInformation
Department NameBihar Legislative Council Secretariat (BLCS), Patna
Advertisement Number02/2025
Post NamesPersonal Assistant, Stenographer, Data Entry Operator (DEO), Lower Division Clerk (LDC)
Total Posts64+ (across various categories)
Job LocationPatna, Bihar
Application ModeOnline
Last Date to ApplyDecember 19, 2025
Official Websitevidhanparishad.bihar.gov.in

Important Dates

Candidates are advised to complete their application within the deadline to avoid last-minute rush and technical issues.

Event Date
Online Application and Registration StartsNovember 28, 2025 (from 05:00 PM)
Exam Fee Payment StartsNovember 28, 2025 (from 05:00 PM)
Last Date for Online ApplicationDecember 19, 2025 (till 11:59 PM)
Last Date for Exam Fee PaymentDecember 21, 2025 (till 11:59 PM)
Date of ExaminationTo be notified soon

Post-wise Vacancy Details

As per Advertisement No. 02/2025, the category-wise details of vacancies for various posts are as follows. Posts are reserved under horizontal reservation for women.

1. Data Entry Operator (DEO) - Total 35 Posts

This is the most prominent post in this notification with the highest number of vacancies.

  • Unreserved (UR): 15
  • Scheduled Caste (SC): 05
  • Scheduled Tribe (ST): 01
  • Extremely Backward Class (EBC): 07
  • Backward Class (BC): 04
  • Economically Weaker Section (EWS): 03

2. Lower Division Clerk (LDC) - Total 10 Posts

  • Unreserved (UR): 04
  • Scheduled Caste (SC): 02
  • Extremely Backward Class (EBC): 01
  • Backward Class (BC): 02
  • Economically Weaker Section (EWS): 01

3. Stenographer - Total 12 Posts

  • Unreserved (UR): 05
  • Scheduled Caste (SC): 05
  • Extremely Backward Class (EBC): 01
  • Economically Weaker Section (EWS): 01

4. Personal Assistant (PA) - Total 07 Posts

  • Unreserved (UR): 02
  • Scheduled Caste (SC): 02
  • Extremely Backward Class (EBC): 01
  • Backward Class (BC): 01
  • Economically Weaker Section (EWS): 01

Eligibility Criteria: Education, Skills, and Age

Before applying, candidates must ensure they fulfill the educational and technical qualifications. All qualifications must be completed by the last date of application.

Educational and Technical Qualification

Post Name Educational Qualification Technical Qualification (Mandatory)
Personal Assistant (PA) Graduation from a recognized university.
  • Hindi Shorthand: 100 words per minute.
  • Hindi and English Typing: 30 words per minute.
  • Computer: 'O' Level / equivalent certificate.
Stenographer (Steno) Graduation from a recognized university.
  • Hindi Shorthand: 80 words per minute.
  • Hindi and English Typing: 30 words per minute.
  • Computer: 'O' Level / equivalent certificate.
Data Entry Operator (DEO) Intermediate (12th Pass) or equivalent.
  • Computer speed of 8000 Key Depressions per hour.
  • Computer: 'O' Level / ADCA certificate.
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Intermediate (12th Pass) or equivalent.
  • Hindi and English Typing: 30 words per minute.
  • Computer: 'O' Level / equivalent certificate.

Age Limit (as on 01.08.2025)

The age will be calculated as of August 1, 2025.

  • Minimum Age: 18 years for LDC and DEO posts; 21 years for PA and Stenographer posts.
  • Maximum Age (Unreserved Male): 37 years.
  • Maximum Age (Unreserved Female/BC/EBC): 40 years.
  • Maximum Age (SC/ST Male & Female): 42 years.

Salary Structure

Selected candidates will be offered an attractive salary as per the 7th Pay Commission (7th CPC). In addition, Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), and Medical Allowance will be admissible as per rules.

Post Pay Level Pay Scale
Personal AssistantLevel-7₹ 44,900 - ₹ 1,42,400
StenographerLevel-4₹ 25,500 - ₹ 81,100
Data Entry OperatorLevel-4₹ 25,500 - ₹ 81,100
Lower Division ClerkLevel-2₹ 19,900 - ₹ 63,200

Selection Process and Exam Pattern

The selection process for all posts is mainly divided into three stages: Preliminary Examination, Skill Test, and Main Examination (if applicable).

Stage 1: Preliminary Examination (OMR Based)

This will be conducted for all posts. It will be an OMR-based multiple-choice objective test.

  • Total Questions: 100
  • Total Marks: 400 (4 marks for each correct answer)
  • Negative Marking: 1 mark will be deducted for each incorrect answer.
  • Duration: 2 hours (120 minutes)

Syllabus for Preliminary Exam:

  • General Studies: 40 questions
  • General Science & Mathematics: 30 questions
  • Mental Ability & Logical Reasoning: 30 questions

Stage 2: Skill Test

Candidates successful in the preliminary exam will be called for a skill test, which varies by post:

(A) For Data Entry Operator (DEO):

  • Hindi and English Typing Test (Computer-based): Speed of 8000 key depressions per hour.
  • MS Office Word Processing Test (Hindi and English): 100 marks.
  • Merit List: Will be prepared based on the marks obtained in the Hindi Typing test.

(B) For Lower Division Clerk (LDC):

  • Hindi and English Typing Test: 30 words per minute.
  • MS Office Word Processing Test.
  • Merit List: Will be prepared based on the marks obtained in the Hindi Typing test.

(C) For Stenographer and Personal Assistant:

  • Hindi Shorthand Test: (100 wpm for PA, 80 wpm for Steno).
  • Hindi and English Typing Test: 30 words per minute (Qualifying).
  • MS Office Word Processing Test.
  • Merit List: Will be prepared based on the marks obtained in the Hindi Shorthand test.

Detailed Syllabus

1. General Studies: Questions will be asked related to Bihar, India, and its neighboring countries. Topics include Current Affairs, Scientific Progress, National/International Awards, Sports, History of India and Bihar, Culture, Geography, Economic Scenario, Agriculture, Constitution of India, Political System, Panchayati Raj, and Five-Year Plans.

2. General Science & Mathematics:
Science: Physics, Chemistry, and Biology of Matriculation standard.
Mathematics: Number system, Computation of whole numbers, Decimals and fractions, Percentage, Ratio and Proportion, Average, Interest, and Profit & Loss.

3. Mental Ability (Reasoning): Analogy, Similarities and Differences, Space visualization, Problem solving, Analysis, Visual memory, Discrimination, Observation, Relationship concepts, Arithmetical reasoning, Arithmetical number series, and Coding-decoding.

How to Apply Online

  1. Visit the Official Portal: First, go to the official website of the Bihar Legislative Council at vidhanparishad.bihar.gov.in.
  2. Register: Click on the "Recruitment" link on the homepage and select "Apply Online for Advt 02/2025". Click on "New Registration" and verify your mobile number and email ID.
  3. Login and Fill the Form: Log in with the User ID and Password. Fill in your personal information, educational qualifications, and other details.
  4. Upload Documents: Scan and upload your photo (recent), signature (Hindi and English), and required certificates (10th, 12th, caste certificate, domicile, etc.).
  5. Fee Payment: Pay the examination fee of ₹100 online.
  6. Print Application: After submitting the form, be sure to take a printout of the "Downloaded Filled Application". It will be required at the time of counseling.
Important Note: Candidates claiming reservation must have a caste certificate and a permanent resident (domicile) certificate issued by a competent authority at the time of filling the application.

Preparation Strategy and Tips

  • Focus on Typing: For DEO and LDC posts, Hindi typing is the main basis of selection. In Bihar exams, Mangal Font (Remington Gail Layout) is commonly used, so practice on this layout.
  • MS Office Knowledge: Passing the Word Processing Test is mandatory. Practice formatting, creating tables, and basic editing in MS Word.
  • Preliminary Exam: Study NCERT books for General Studies and Science, and a standard book on Bihar Special GK. Solve regular practice sets for reasoning.

Important Links

Details Link
Official Notification (PDF Download) Click Here
Apply Online (from 28.11.2025) Click Here
Official Website Click Here

FAQs – Frequently Asked Questions

Question 1: Can candidates from other states apply?
Yes, any citizen of India can apply. However, candidates from outside Bihar will not get the benefit of reservation and will be considered in the Unreserved category.
Question 2: Can I apply for more than one post?
Yes, if you meet the eligibility criteria for the respective posts, you can apply for more than one post.
Question 3: Is there negative marking in the exam?
Yes, in the preliminary exam, 1 mark will be deducted for each wrong answer, while 4 marks will be awarded for a correct answer.
Question 4: What font will be used for the typing test?
The notification does not specify, but most exams in Bihar use the 'Mangal Font' (Remington Gail Layout) for Hindi typing.
Question 5: Is an 'O' Level computer certificate mandatory?
Yes, for most posts, a DOEACC/NIELIT 'O' Level or its equivalent (like a 1-year computer diploma/ADCA as described in the advertisement) is mandatory.

entry.title: IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 for Non-Teaching Staff
entry.content:
IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 for Non-Teaching Staff

Advertisement No. IITGoa/RECT/2026/01: The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Goa, an Institute of National Importance, has announced a recruitment drive for various Group 'A' and Group 'C' non-teaching positions. Online applications are invited from eligible Indian citizens for the posts of Assistant Registrar and Technical Assistant in multiple disciplines. The online application portal will be open from January 30, 2026, to February 20, 2026.

Post Name: Assistant Registrar, Technical Assistant (Chemistry, CSE, Physics, Mechanical)
Last Date: 20 February 2026
Total Posts: 5

The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Goa, established in 2016 by an Act of Parliament, is a premier institution dedicated to promoting education and research in engineering, science, and technology. To support its growing operational needs, the institute is seeking to recruit talented and motivated individuals for key non-teaching positions. This recruitment drive aims to fill one Group 'A' post of Assistant Registrar and four Group 'C' posts of Technical Assistant across various departments including Chemistry, CSE, Physics, and Mechanical Engineering.

This is an excellent opportunity for candidates with the requisite qualifications and experience to build a career in one of India's prestigious IITs. The selection process will be competitive, involving a written test and/or an interview, depending on the post. The application process is entirely online, and candidates must ensure they meet all the eligibility criteria before applying. Successful candidates will be offered a position with a one-year probation period and will be entitled to pay and allowances as per Government of India norms applicable to IIT Goa.

IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 (Important Points)

Candidates must carefully review the key dates and details to ensure a successful application. The entire process, from application to shortlisting, will be conducted online.

Particulars Details
Recruitment Organization Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
Advertisement Number IITGoa/RECT/2026/01
Post Names Assistant Registrar & Technical Assistant
Total Vacancies 05
Application Start Date 30 January 2026 (5:00 PM)
Application Last Date 20 February 2026 (11:59 PM)
Application Mode Online
Job Type Permanent (Subject to one-year probation)
Job Location Ponda, Goa
Official Website www.iitgoa.ac.in

Vacancy, Pay Level, and Age Limit Details

A total of 5 posts have been advertised across Group 'A' and Group 'C' categories. The detailed breakdown is as follows:

Post Name Vacancies Category Pay Level (7th CPC) Group Max. Age Limit
Assistant Registrar 1 UR Level 10 A 42 years
Technical Assistant (Chemistry) 1 UR Level 4 C 27 years
Technical Assistant (CSE) 1 UR Level 4 C 27 years
Technical Assistant (Physics) 1 EWS Level 4 C 27 years
Technical Assistant (Mechanical) 1 OBC-NCL Level 4 C 27 years
Total 5
Note: Age relaxation for reserved category applicants (EWS, OBC-NCL), PwBD, and Ex-servicemen will be applicable as per Government of India norms.

Application Fee (Non-Refundable)

  • For Group 'A' posts (Assistant Registrar): ₹500/-
  • For Group 'C' posts (Technical Assistant): ₹100/-

There is NO application fee for SC, ST, PwBD, and Female applicants. The fee must be paid online separately for each post a candidate applies for.

Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must ensure they possess the minimum essential qualifications and experience as of the last date of application.

Post Name Essential Qualifications & Experience
Assistant Registrar Qualification: Master's degree with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent grade point average.

Experience: 6 years of relevant experience in Pay Level 06 and above, OR 3 years in Pay Level 07 and above. The experience should be in areas like Legal, Finance & Accounts, Establishment, Materials Management, Academics, Student Welfare, R&D, etc.
Technical Assistant (Chemistry) Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Chemistry or a Bachelor's degree with Chemistry as the main subject, with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA.
Technical Assistant (CSE) Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA.
Technical Assistant (Physics) Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Physics with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA.
Technical Assistant (Mechanical) Qualification: 3-year Diploma in Mechanical, Production, or Manufacturing Engineering with at least 60% marks and 2 years of relevant experience post-diploma.
OR
Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Production, or Mechanical Engineering with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA.

Selection Process

The selection methodology is different for Group 'A' and Group 'C' posts.

  1. For Assistant Registrar (Group 'A', Pay Level 10):
    • A Written Test or any other evaluation process may be conducted, which will be qualifying in nature.
    • Candidates who qualify in the initial stage will be called for an Interview.
    • The final selection will be based solely on the performance in the Interview.
  2. For Technical Assistant (Group 'C', Pay Level 4):
    • The selection will be based on a Written Test as per the recruitment rules.
    • The "Written Test" may be a traditional pen-paper test, a Computer Based Test (CBT), a Trade Test to assess practical skills, or any other mode as deemed fit by the institute.
    • The final merit list will be prepared based on the marks obtained in this test.

Exam Pattern and Syllabus

The detailed syllabus and pattern will be uploaded on the Careers@IITGoa page of the institute's website. However, a general pattern can be expected.

For Assistant Registrar (Qualifying Test):

The test is likely to cover topics related to General Administration, Government Rules (FR, SR, GFR), Financial Management, Educational Administration, and general aptitude. The focus is to screen candidates for the interview.

For Technical Assistant (Written Test):

The test will primarily focus on the core technical subjects related to the specific discipline. Candidates should prepare based on their Bachelor's degree/Diploma syllabus.

  • Chemistry: Topics from Organic, Inorganic, Physical, and Analytical Chemistry.
  • CSE: Topics like Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Programming.
  • Physics: Topics from Classical Mechanics, Electromagnetism, Quantum Mechanics, and Electronics.
  • Mechanical: Topics from Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, Theory of Machines, and Manufacturing Processes.

The test may also include a section on general aptitude, reasoning, and English language skills.

PET (Physical Efficiency Test)

There is no Physical Efficiency Test (PET) mentioned for any of the non-teaching posts in this recruitment advertisement.

How to Prepare for the Selection

A targeted preparation strategy is essential for success.

  • For Assistant Registrar: Focus on GFR 2017, CCS (Conduct) Rules, CCS (Leave) Rules, and other central government service rules. Prepare for the interview by brushing up on your experience and understanding the administrative structure of an IIT.
  • For Technical Assistants: Thoroughly revise the core subjects from your diploma/degree curriculum. Solve standard objective question books like GATE/NET (for conceptual clarity) for your respective discipline. Practice numerical problems and be prepared for a potential trade test to demonstrate practical skills.
  • For All Posts: Regularly check the IIT Goa website for updates on the syllabus and exam schedule. Improve your communication skills, as they are desirable for all positions.

Best Books for Preparation

Preparation should be specific to the post. Candidates can refer to standard academic and competitive exam books.

  • For Assistant Registrar: "Swamy's Handbook for Central Government Staff" and books on General Financial Rules (GFR).
  • For TA (Chemistry): "Advanced Organic Chemistry" by Jerry March; "Inorganic Chemistry" by J.D. Lee.
  • For TA (CSE): Standard textbooks for GATE preparation in Computer Science.
  • For TA (Physics): "Introduction to Electrodynamics" by David J. Griffiths; "Concepts of Modern Physics" by Arthur Beiser.
  • For TA (Mechanical): "Theory of Machines" by R.S. Khurmi; "A Textbook of Fluid Mechanics" by R.K. Bansal.

How to Apply Online

The application process is strictly online. No hard copies are to be sent.

  1. Visit the official IIT Goa website and navigate to the "Careers" or "Staff Recruitment" section.
  2. Find the advertisement (No. IITGoa/RECT/2026/01) and read the instructions carefully.
  3. Click on the online application link, which will be active from 5:00 PM on January 30, 2026.
  4. Register on the portal and fill out the application form with accurate personal, academic, and experience details.
  5. Upload clear, scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and all other required documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, caste certificate, etc.).
  6. Pay the application fee online through the payment gateway (if applicable).
  7. Review the application thoroughly before final submission.
  8. If applying for more than one post, you must submit a separate application and pay the fee for each post.
  9. After submission, save a copy of the final application form for your records.

Documents Needed to Apply (for Uploading)

Candidates must have scanned copies of the following documents ready before starting the application process:

  1. Recent passport-size photograph.
  2. Scanned signature.
  3. Certificates and mark sheets of all educational qualifications (10th, 12th, Diploma, Degree, Master's).
  4. Experience certificates in the prescribed format (on organization's letterhead, with dates, designation, and salary).
  5. Category Certificate (EWS, OBC-NCL, SC, ST, PwBD) as per Government of India format.
  6. No Objection Certificate (NOC) if currently employed in a government/semi-government organization (can be submitted later at the interview stage).

Important Links

Action Link
Official Notification Click Here
Online Application Portal Link will be available on the career page from 30.01.2026
Official Website Click Here

(FAQs)

Q1: Is there an application fee for female candidates?

No, as per the notification, female applicants are exempted from paying the application fee for all posts.

Q2: Can I apply for both Assistant Registrar and Technical Assistant (CSE) if I am eligible for both?

Yes, you can apply for more than one post. However, you must submit a separate online application and pay the application fee separately for each post.

Q3: What is the final selection criteria for the Assistant Registrar post?

The final selection for the Assistant Registrar post will be based solely on the candidate's performance in the personal interview. The written test for this post is only qualifying in nature.

Q4: Do I need to send a printout of the application form to IIT Goa?

No, the notification clearly states that there is no need to send the hard copy (printout) of the application. The entire process is online.

entry.title: TRTI पुलिस भर्ती 2025: महाराष्ट्र पुलिस में भर्ती के लिए फ्री ट्रेनिंग!
entry.content:
TRTI पुलिस भर्ती 2025: महाराष्ट्र पुलिस में भर्ती के लिए फ्री ट्रेनिंग प्रोग्राम!

आदिवासी युवाओं के लिए पुलिस कांस्टेबल बनने का सुनहरा मौका, TRTI देगा फ्री रेजिडेंशियल ट्रेनिंग।

नमस्कार दोस्तों! महाराष्ट्र के आदिवासी (Scheduled Tribe) युवाओं के लिए पुलिस फोर्स में शामिल होने का सपना साकार करने का एक शानदार अवसर है। हर साल की तरह, Tribal Research & Training Institute (TRTI), पुणे ने महाराष्ट्र पुलिस कांस्टेबल भर्ती की तैयारी के लिए फ्री रेजिडेंशियल ट्रेनिंग प्रोग्राम की घोषणा की है। यह कोई डायरेक्ट भर्ती नहीं है, बल्कि यह एक प्री-रिक्रूटमेंट ट्रेनिंग प्रोग्राम है जिसका उद्देश्य अनुसूचित जनजाति के बेरोजगार युवाओं को आगामी महाराष्ट्र पुलिस भर्ती 2025 के लिए तैयार करना है।

इस कार्यक्रम के तहत, चयनित उम्मीदवारों को लिखित परीक्षा और शारीरिक परीक्षा दोनों के लिए विशेषज्ञ प्रशिक्षकों द्वारा कोचिंग दी जाएगी। यह पूरी तरह से रेजिडेंशियल प्रोग्राम है जिसमें रहने, खाने और प्रशिक्षण का सारा खर्च सरकार वहन करेगी। आधिकारिक अधिसूचना जल्द ही जारी होने की उम्मीद है। इस लेख में हम पिछले वर्ष की जानकारी के आधार पर इस कार्यक्रम से जुड़ी सभी महत्वपूर्ण जानकारियाँ साझा कर रहे हैं।

TRTI पुलिस प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम 2025: विवरण

यह ध्यान रखना आवश्यक है कि TRTI स्वयं पुलिस पदों पर नियुक्ति नहीं करता, बल्कि महाराष्ट्र पुलिस भर्ती में सफल होने के लिए उम्मीदवारों को तैयार करता है। हर साल बड़ी संख्या में युवाओं का चयन इस प्रशिक्षण हेतु किया जाता है।

प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रमआयोजक संस्थासंबंधित विभागकुल सीटें (अनुमानित)
प्री-पुलिस भर्ती रेजिडेंशियल ट्रेनिंग प्रोग्रामTribal Research & Training Institute (TRTI), पुणेमहाराष्ट्र पुलिस (कांस्टेबल पद)जल्द घोषित होगा (आमतौर पर 1000+)

प्रशिक्षण के लाभ (Stipend व सुविधाएँ)

यह एक नौकरी नहीं बल्कि एक फ्री प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम है। इसमें वेतन नहीं दिया जाता, परंतु सरकार प्रशिक्षण अवधि में कई सुविधाएँ उपलब्ध कराती है ताकि उम्मीदवार पूरी लगन से तैयारी कर सकें।

सुविधाविवरण
प्रशिक्षण शुल्कपूरी तरह निशुल्क (Free of Cost)
निवास व भोजनमुफ़्त रेजिडेंशियल सुविधा (रहने और खाने की व्यवस्था)
स्टाइपेंडप्रशिक्षण अवधि में प्रतिदिन के खर्च हेतु अनुदान (Stipend) प्रदान किया जाता है।
प्रशिक्षण किटयूनिफॉर्म, जूते और अध्ययन सामग्री सरकार द्वारा दी जाती है।

पात्रता मानदंड (अनुमानित)

इस प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम में शामिल होने के लिए उम्मीदवारों को महाराष्ट्र पुलिस कांस्टेबल भर्ती के अनुसार न्यूनतम योग्यता पूरी करनी होगी।

मानदंडविवरण
रहिवासीउम्मीदवार महाराष्ट्र राज्य का मूल निवासी होना चाहिए।
प्रवर्गकेवल अनुसूचित जनजाति (ST) वर्ग के उम्मीदवार आवेदन कर सकते हैं।
शैक्षणिक योग्यतामान्यता प्राप्त बोर्ड से 12वीं (HSC) उत्तीर्ण।
आयु सीमा18 से 28 वर्ष (आरक्षित वर्ग हेतु नियम अनुसार छूट)।

शारीरिक मानक

उम्मीदवारों को महाराष्ट्र पुलिस द्वारा निर्धारित शारीरिक मानकों को पूरा करना आवश्यक है।

लिंगऊँचाईछाती (केवल पुरुष)
पुरुष165 सेमी (न्यूनतम)79 सेमी (संकुचित), 84 सेमी (विस्तारित)
महिला155 सेमी (न्यूनतम)लागू नहीं

महत्वपूर्ण तिथियाँ (अनुमानित)

घटनातिथि
ऑनलाइन आवेदन प्रारंभजल्द घोषित होगा
ऑनलाइन आवेदन की अंतिम तिथिजल्द घोषित होगा
आवेदन शुल्क: यह प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम पूरी तरह से निशुल्क (Free) है।

चयन प्रक्रिया

यह चयन प्रक्रिया केवल प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम में प्रवेश के लिए है, नौकरी के लिए नहीं। TRTI आवेदन के आधार पर मेरिट सूची तैयार करता है।

चरणविवरण
चरण 1ऑनलाइन आवेदन
चरण 2जिला स्तर पर दस्तावेज़ सत्यापन
चरण 312वीं कक्षा के अंकों के आधार पर मेरिट सूची
चरण 4अंतिम चयन और प्रवेश

आवेदन प्रक्रिया एवं आवश्यक दस्तावेज़

  1. TRTI की वेबसाइट trti.maharashtra.gov.in पर जाएँ।
  2. "Police Bharti Purv Prashikshan 2025" लिंक चुनें।
  3. निर्देश पढ़ें और "Apply Online" पर क्लिक करें।
  4. पंजीकरण फॉर्म सही-सही भरें।
  5. निम्नलिखित दस्तावेज़ अपलोड करें:
  • आधार कार्ड
  • डोमिसाइल प्रमाणपत्र
  • वैध जाति प्रमाणपत्र (ST)
  • 12वीं (HSC) मार्कशीट व प्रमाणपत्र
  • फोटो और हस्ताक्षर की स्कैन कॉपी

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंक शीर्षकक्रिया
ऑनलाइन आवेदनयहाँ क्लिक करें (जल्द सक्रिय होगा)
आधिकारिक अधिसूचना PDFयहाँ क्लिक करें (जल्द उपलब्ध होगा)
आधिकारिक वेबसाइटयहाँ क्लिक करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

प्रश्न 1: क्या TRTI पुलिस भर्ती डायरेक्ट जॉब है?

नहीं, यह डायरेक्ट नौकरी नहीं है। यह महाराष्ट्र पुलिस कांस्टेबल भर्ती के लिए एक फ्री रेजिडेंशियल ट्रेनिंग प्रोग्राम है।

प्रश्न 2: कौन आवेदन कर सकता है?

केवल महाराष्ट्र के मूल निवासी ST वर्ग के 12वीं पास उम्मीदवार आवेदन कर सकते हैं।

प्रश्न 3: चयन कैसे होगा?

चयन 12वीं के अंकों के आधार पर तैयार मेरिट सूची से किया जाएगा।

entry.title: BSF Constable (GD) Sports Quota भर्ती 2025: 391 पदों के लिए आवेदन करें!
entry.content:
BSF Constable (GD) Sports Quota भर्ती 2025: 391 पदों के लिए आवेदन करें!

पदक जीतने वाले महिला और पुरुष खिलाड़ियों के लिए बॉर्डर सिक्योरिटी फोर्स (BSF) में शामिल होने का सुनहरा अवसर।

नमस्कार खिलाड़ियों! Border Security Force (BSF), जो कि Ministry of Home Affairs के अंतर्गत आती है, ने Meritorious Sportspersons के लिए Constable (General Duty) पद पर भर्ती हेतु अधिसूचना जारी की है। यह भर्ती वर्ष 2025 के लिए Sports Quota के अंतर्गत की जा रही है, जिसमें कुल 391 पद शामिल हैं (महिला और पुरुष दोनों के लिए)।

यह उन खिलाड़ियों के लिए शानदार अवसर है जो देश की सेवा के साथ अपने खेल के जुनून को आगे बढ़ाना चाहते हैं। आवेदन प्रक्रिया पूरी तरह से ऑनलाइन है। नीचे दी गई जानकारी में आपको पात्रता, चयन प्रक्रिया, आवेदन शुल्क, और अन्य महत्वपूर्ण विवरण मिलेंगे।

BSF Sports Quota भर्ती 2025: पदों का विवरण

श्रेणीपदों की संख्या
पुरुष खिलाड़ी197
महिला खिलाड़ी194
कुल391

ये पद 29 खेल विधाओं जैसे Archery, Athletics, Boxing, Basketball, Football, Gymnastics, Hockey, Judo, Swimming, Volleyball, Wrestling आदि में भरे जाएँगे। प्रत्येक खेल में पदों की संख्या और विवरण आधिकारिक अधिसूचना में दिया गया है।

नोट: पदों की संख्या अनुमानित है और इनमें परिवर्तन संभव है। चयनित उम्मीदवारों की पोस्टिंग भारत में कहीं भी की जा सकती है।

महत्वपूर्ण तिथियाँ

घटनातिथि / समय
ऑनलाइन आवेदन प्रारंभ16 अक्टूबर 2025 (00:01 बजे से)
ऑनलाइन आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि04 नवम्बर 2025 (रात 11:59 बजे तक)

वेतनमान और आवेदन शुल्क

वेतनमान (Pay Scale): चयनित उम्मीदवारों को 7th CPC के अनुसार Level-3 (₹21,700 – ₹69,100) वेतनमान के साथ अन्य भत्ते प्रदान किए जाएँगे।

आवेदन शुल्क: केवल General (UR) और OBC श्रेणी के पुरुष उम्मीदवारों के लिए ₹159/-। महिला, SC, ST श्रेणी के उम्मीदवारों को कोई शुल्क नहीं देना होगा।

पात्रता शर्तें (Eligibility Criteria)

मानदंडविवरण
आयु सीमा1 अगस्त 2025 तक 18 से 23 वर्ष।
आयु में छूटSC/ST को 5 वर्ष, OBC को 3 वर्ष की छूट। अन्य छूट सरकारी नियमों के अनुसार।
शैक्षणिक योग्यताकिसी मान्यता प्राप्त बोर्ड से 10वीं कक्षा उत्तीर्ण।
खेल योग्यतावे खिलाड़ी जिन्होंने 04/11/2023 से 04/11/2025 के बीच राष्ट्रीय या अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर की प्रतियोगिता में भाग लिया या पदक जीता है, पात्र हैं।

चयन प्रक्रिया (Selection Process)

  1. ऑनलाइन आवेदन एवं जांच: उम्मीदवारों द्वारा अपलोड किए गए स्पोर्ट्स सर्टिफिकेट्स की जांच की जाएगी।
  2. दस्तावेज़ सत्यापन: योग्य उम्मीदवारों के सभी मूल दस्तावेज़ों की जांच होगी।
  3. Physical Standard Test (PST): ऊँचाई और छाती माप का परीक्षण किया जाएगा।
  4. Medical Examination: PST पास करने वालों का विस्तृत मेडिकल परीक्षण होगा।
  5. Merit List: अंतिम मेरिट सूची खिलाड़ियों की उपलब्धियों के आधार पर तैयार की जाएगी।

शारीरिक मापदंड (Physical Standards)

पैरामीटरपुरुषमहिला
लंबाई170 सेमी157 सेमी
छाती80 सेमी (सामान्य)
85 सेमी (फुलाने पर)		लागू नहीं

छूट: ST, Gorkha, Kumaoni, Dogra, Maratha एवं उत्तर-पूर्वी राज्यों के उम्मीदवारों को ऊँचाई/छाती में छूट मिलेगी।

ऑनलाइन आवेदन प्रक्रिया

  1. BSF भर्ती पोर्टल पर जाएँ: https://rectt.bsf.gov.in
  2. नए उम्मीदवार ‘One Time Registration (OTR)’ करें, पुराने उम्मीदवार लॉगिन करें।
  3. “Recruitment of Meritorious Sportspersons to the post of Constable (GD) 2025” लिंक पर क्लिक करें।
  4. सभी विवरण सही-सही भरें और आवश्यक दस्तावेज़ (फोटो, सिग्नेचर, स्पोर्ट्स सर्टिफिकेट) अपलोड करें।
  5. यदि लागू हो, तो शुल्क का भुगतान करें।
  6. फाइनल सबमिशन से पहले फॉर्म जाँचें और प्रिंट आउट निकालें।

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंक शीर्षककार्यवाही
ऑनलाइन आवेदन करेंयहाँ क्लिक करें
अधिसूचना PDFडाउनलोड करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

प्रश्न 1: क्या इसमें लिखित परीक्षा होगी?
नहीं, इसमें कोई लिखित परीक्षा नहीं है। चयन पूरी तरह से खेल उपलब्धियों, दस्तावेज़ सत्यापन, PST और मेडिकल परीक्षा पर आधारित है।
प्रश्न 2: क्या यह स्थायी नौकरी है?
शुरुआत में नियुक्ति अस्थायी आधार पर होगी, लेकिन बाद में स्थायी होने की संभावना है।
प्रश्न 3: क्या राज्य स्तरीय खिलाड़ी पात्र हैं?
मुख्य रूप से वे खिलाड़ी पात्र हैं जिन्होंने राष्ट्रीय या अंतरराष्ट्रीय प्रतियोगिता में भाग लिया या पदक जीता है।
प्रश्न 4: क्या महिला उम्मीदवारों को शुल्क देना होगा?
नहीं, सभी श्रेणियों की महिला उम्मीदवारों को आवेदन शुल्क से छूट दी गई है।

entry.title: डॉ. राम मनोहर लोहिया इंस्टीट्यूट भर्ती 2025: ग्रुप B और C के 30+ नॉन-टीचिंग पदों पर भर्ती!
entry.content:
डॉ. राम मनोहर लोहिया इंस्टीट्यूट भर्ती 2025: ग्रुप B और C के 30+ नॉन-टीचिंग पदों पर भर्ती!

डॉ. राम मनोहर लोहिया इंस्टीट्यूट ऑफ मेडिकल साइंसेज (Dr. RMLIMS), लखनऊ ने मेडिकल और पैरामेडिकल पदों के लिए ऑनलाइन आवेदन मांगे हैं। परीक्षा CBT मोड में होगी।

मेडिकल फील्ड में करियर बनाने की इच्छा रखने वाले उम्मीदवारों के लिए बड़ी खबर! डॉ. राम मनोहर लोहिया इंस्टीट्यूट ऑफ मेडिकल साइंसेज (Dr. RMLIMS), लखनऊ ने ग्रुप ‘B’ और ‘C’ के नॉन-टीचिंग (Medical और Paramedical) पदों पर भर्ती के लिए अधिसूचना जारी की है। इस भर्ती में Pharmacist Gr-II, Medical Social Service Officer, Medical Officer सहित कई पद शामिल हैं।

चयन प्रक्रिया कंप्यूटर आधारित परीक्षा (CBT) के माध्यम से की जाएगी। यह उत्तर प्रदेश के प्रमुख मेडिकल संस्थानों में काम करने का सुनहरा अवसर है। योग्य उम्मीदवारों को सलाह दी जाती है कि वे आधिकारिक वेबसाइट पर उपलब्ध अधिसूचना को ध्यानपूर्वक पढ़ें और समय पर आवेदन करें।

महत्वपूर्ण तिथियाँ

ऑनलाइन आवेदन लिंक नवम्बर 2025 के पहले या दूसरे सप्ताह में जारी होने की संभावना है। उम्मीदवारों को सलाह दी जाती है कि वे www.drrmlims.ac.in वेबसाइट को नियमित रूप से चेक करें। आवेदन प्रारंभ होने के बाद एक माह का समय आवेदन के लिए मिलेगा।

रिक्तियों का विवरण

पद का नामग्रुपकुल पद
Pharmacist Grade-IIC15
Medical Social Service Officer Grade-IIC13
Medical Officer of HealthB2
Lady Medical OfficerB1
Child PsychologistB1
Casualty Medical OfficerB1

आवेदन शुल्क

  • सामान्य / OBC / EWS: ₹1180/- (₹1000 + 18% GST)
  • SC / ST: ₹708/- (₹600 + 18% GST)
  • दिव्यांगजन: कोई शुल्क नहीं

शुल्क केवल ऑनलाइन माध्यम से जमा होगा और यह non-refundable है।

पात्रता मानदंड

पद का नामशैक्षणिक योग्यता एवं अनुभवआयु सीमा
Pharmacist Grade-II Pharmacy में डिप्लोमा, Pharmacy Act 1948 के अंतर्गत Registered Pharmacist होना आवश्यक। B.Pharm डिग्री एवं 2 वर्ष का अनुभव वांछनीय। 18 से 40 वर्ष (आरक्षित वर्गों को शासनानुसार छूट)
Medical Officer (Health/Lady/Casualty)MBBS डिग्री (Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 के Schedule I या II में मान्य) और 1 वर्ष की Internship पूर्ण की हो।
Medical Social Service Officer Grade-IISocial Work में मास्टर डिग्री। मेडिकल या पब्लिक हेल्थ सर्विस में अनुभव वांछनीय।
Child PsychologistPsychology में M.A./M.Sc. के साथ Clinical Psychology में M.Phil. या मान्यता प्राप्त प्रमाणपत्र। Ph.D. वांछनीय।

चयन प्रक्रिया

चयन दो चरणों में होगा: Screening Test और Main Examination। दोनों परीक्षा हिन्दी एवं अंग्रेज़ी में आयोजित होंगी।

  1. स्क्रीनिंग परीक्षा: यह मुख्य परीक्षा में भाग लेने के लिए qualifying टेस्ट है। इसके अंक फाइनल चयन में नहीं जोड़े जाएंगे।
  2. मुख्य परीक्षा:
    • फाइनल चयन मुख्य परीक्षा के अंकों पर आधारित होगा।
    • दोनों परीक्षाएँ 100 अंकों की होंगी और अवधि 2 घंटे की होगी।
    • पैटर्न: 60 अंक विषय आधारित, 10 अंग्रेज़ी, 10 सामान्य ज्ञान, 10 रीजनिंग, 10 गणितीय योग्यता।
    • नकारात्मक अंकन: हर गलत उत्तर पर 0.25 अंक काटे जाएंगे।
  3. साक्षात्कार: कुछ ग्रुप-B पदों (Sl. No. 3–6) के लिए साक्षात्कार भी होगा।

आवेदन प्रक्रिया

  1. आधिकारिक वेबसाइट www.drrmlims.ac.in पर जाएं।
  2. “Recruitment” सेक्शन में जाकर “Online Form Submission” पर क्लिक करें।
  3. Valid मोबाइल नंबर और ईमेल आईडी से रजिस्ट्रेशन करें।
  4. फॉर्म में शैक्षणिक और अनुभव संबंधी जानकारी भरें।
  5. फोटो, हस्ताक्षर और सभी दस्तावेज़ स्कैन कर अपलोड करें।
  6. शुल्क ऑनलाइन जमा करें और फाइनल सबमिट करें।
  7. अंत में प्रिंटआउट लेकर सुरक्षित रखें।

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंक शीर्षककार्यवाही
ऑनलाइन आवेदनयहाँ क्लिक करें (लिंक नवम्बर 2025 में सक्रिय होगा)
आधिकारिक वेबसाइटयहाँ क्लिक करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

प्र.1: क्या यूपी के बाहर के उम्मीदवार आवेदन कर सकते हैं?
हाँ, कोई भी भारतीय नागरिक आवेदन कर सकता है, लेकिन उन्हें सामान्य वर्ग (UR) में माना जाएगा। आरक्षण का लाभ केवल यूपी के निवासी को मिलेगा।
प्र.2: क्या मैं एक से अधिक पदों के लिए आवेदन कर सकता हूँ?
हाँ, परंतु हर पद के लिए अलग आवेदन एवं शुल्क देना होगा।
प्र.3: क्या परीक्षा में निगेटिव मार्किंग है?
हाँ, हर गलत उत्तर पर 0.25 अंक काटे जाएंगे।
प्र.4: फाइनल चयन किस आधार पर होगा?
फाइनल चयन मुख्य परीक्षा के अंकों और (जहां लागू हो) साक्षात्कार अंकों के आधार पर तैयार मेरिट लिस्ट से होगा।

entry.title: IOCL Paradip Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2025: A Golden Opportunity for 414 Posts
entry.content:
IOCL Paradip Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2025: A Golden Opportunity for 414 Posts

A fantastic chance for 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, and Graduates to join India's flagship energy major. Selection based purely on merit of qualifying examination marks.

Post Name: Trade Apprentice, Technician Apprentice
Last Date: 18/12/2025
Total Posts: 414

Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL), one of India's largest commercial enterprises and a Fortune "Global 500" company, has released a major recruitment notification as part of its Skill Building Initiative for the nation. This recruitment is for engaging youths as Apprentices in various trades and disciplines at IOCL's Paradip Refinery Unit in Odisha. Under Advertisement No. PDR/HR/02/Apprentices-25, applications have been invited for a total of 414 seats, offering a magnificent opportunity for candidates with qualifications ranging from 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, to Graduation.

This recruitment is being conducted under the provisions of the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973, with the primary objective of enhancing the skills of the youth by providing them with practical, on-the-job training in the industry, thereby making them more employable. The most attractive aspect of this recruitment is that there will be NO WRITTEN EXAMINATION. The selection of candidates will be done purely through a merit list prepared based on the percentage of marks obtained in their qualifying academic qualifications. This merit-based approach ensures a transparent and fair selection process, rewarding academic excellence.

Through this apprenticeship program, IOCL is providing training to the youth not only in technical fields such as Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, and Instrumentation but also in non-technical areas like Accountant and Data Entry Operator. The training period will range from 12 to 15 months, during which the apprentices will also be paid a fixed monthly stipend. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online from November 28, 2025, to December 18, 2025. This comprehensive article will provide you with all the essential information related to this recruitment, such as post-wise vacancies, qualifications, age limit, selection process, and how to apply.

Recruitment Overview (Important Points)

Here is a concise overview of the key details regarding this apprenticeship drive. Aspirants are advised to take careful note of this information.

ParticularsInformation
Organization NameIndian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) - Paradip Refinery
Advertisement NumberPDR/HR/02/Apprentices-25
Post NameTrade Apprentice and Technician Apprentice
Total Posts414
Job LocationParadip Refinery, Odisha
Application ModeOnline
Application DatesNovember 28, 2025, to December 18, 2025

Vacancy Details and Reservation

IOCL Paradip Refinery has invited applications for a total of 414 Apprentice posts in various trades and disciplines. These vacancies are divided into different categories as per the reservation rules of the state of Odisha. A detailed post-wise and category-wise breakdown of the vacancies is provided below:

Code Trade/Discipline Total Posts UR EWS SC ST OBC(NCL) PwBD
101 Trade Apprentice - Attendant Operator (Chemical Plant) 130 52 13 21 29 15 0
102 Trade Apprentice - Fitter 40 16 4 6 9 5 3
104 Technician Apprentice - Chemical 70 29 7 11 15 8 0
105 Technician Apprentice - Mechanical 50 20 5 8 11 6 4
106 Technician Apprentice - Electrical 80 32 8 13 17 10 5
107 Technician Apprentice - Instrumentation 20 9 2 3 4 2 2
108 Trade Apprentice - Secretarial Assistant 1 1 0 0 0 0 0
109 Trade Apprentice - Accountant 1 1 0 0 0 0 0
110 Trade Apprentice - Data Entry Operator (Fresher) 16 5 2 3 4 2 2
111 Trade Apprentice - Data Entry Operator (Skill Certificate Holder) 5 2 0 1 1 1 0
Grand Total 414 167 41 66 90 50 19

Stipend and Training Period

Selected apprentices will be paid a fixed monthly stipend as per the Apprenticeship Act, 1961/1973, and the corporation's guidelines. The duration of training varies for different posts as detailed below:

Post Name Training Period
Trade Apprentice - Secretarial Assistant (Code 108) 15 Months
All other Trade/Technician Apprentices 12 Months

Eligibility Criteria: Educational Qualification & Age Limit

Specific educational qualifications have been prescribed for each trade/discipline. Candidates must ensure that they have obtained the prescribed qualification as of the date of eligibility calculation (November 30, 2025).

Educational Qualification

Code Trade/Discipline Educational Qualification Minimum Marks
101 Attendant Operator (Chemical Plant) 3 years B.Sc (Maths, Physics, Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry) 50% (45% for SC/ST/PwBD)
102 Fitter Matric (10th) with ITI (Pass Class) in Fitter trade of minimum 2 years duration
104 Technician Apprentice - Chemical 3 years Diploma in Chemical Engg./Petrochemical Engg./Chemical Technology/Refinery & Petrochemical Engg.
105 Technician Apprentice - Mechanical 3 years Diploma in Mechanical Engineering.
106 Technician Apprentice - Electrical 3 years Diploma in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering.
107 Technician Apprentice - Instrumentation 3 years Diploma in Instrumentation Engg./Instrumentation & Electronics/Instrumentation & Control Engg./Applied Electronics & Instrumentation Engg.
108 Secretarial Assistant 3 years B.A./B.Sc./B.Com.
109 Accountant 3 years B.Com. 50% (45% for SC/ST/PwBD)
110 Data Entry Operator (Fresher) Class 12th Pass. 50% (45% for SC/ST/PwBD)
111 Data Entry Operator (Skill Certificate Holder) Class 12th Pass with Skill Certificate in 'Domestic Data Entry Operator'.
Important Note: All qualifications (except ITI) must be from a recognized Board/University as a regular full-time course. Qualifications acquired through distance learning, part-time, or correspondence will not be considered.

Age Limit (as on 30.11.2025)

The age limit for General and EWS category candidates is as follows:

CriteriaAge
Minimum Age18 years
Maximum Age24 years

Upper Age Limit Relaxation:

  • SC/ST: 5 years
  • OBC (NCL): 3 years
  • PwBD: 10 years (15 years for PwBD-SC/ST and 13 years for PwBD-OBC(NCL))

Selection Methodology: A Merit-Based Approach

A key highlight of this recruitment is that there will be NO WRITTEN EXAMINATION. The selection process is completely transparent and merit-based, founded on the following criteria:

  1. Merit List Preparation: The selection of candidates will be based on the percentage of marks obtained in the prescribed educational qualification for the respective trade/discipline. A merit list will be prepared in descending order based on the aggregate marks of all years/semesters.
  2. Preference: Preference will be given to candidates applying for apprenticeship training for the first time.
  3. Tie-Breaker Rule:
    • In case two or more candidates have the same marks in the qualifying examination, the candidate who is older in age will be placed higher on the merit list.
    • If the date of birth is also the same, the candidate who has obtained higher marks in Matriculation (10th class) will be given preference.
  4. Document Verification (DV): Candidates shortlisted based on the merit list will be called for document verification. During this stage, candidates must produce all their original certificates and their self-attested copies for verification.
  5. Pre-Engagement Medical Fitness: Candidates found successful in document verification will have to undergo a Pre-Engagement Medical Examination. The final offer for apprenticeship will be extended only to those candidates who are declared medically fit.

How to Apply (A Mandatory Two-Step Process)

The application process is a two-step procedure and is entirely online. It is mandatory for candidates to first register on the relevant government apprenticeship portal and then apply on the IOCL portal.

Step I: Registration and Application on NAPS/NATS Portal

  1. For Trade Apprentices (Codes 101, 102, 108, 109, 110, 111): Candidates must register themselves on the NAPS Portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/).
  2. For Technician Apprentices (Codes 104, 105, 106, 107): Candidates must register themselves on the NATS Portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/).
  3. After registration, candidates must log in to the portal and apply for the apprenticeship opportunity at IOCL Paradip Refinery.
    • NATS Establishment ID: EORJSC000003
    • NAPS Establishment ID: E07192100001
  4. Ensure your profile is 100% complete and all details (personal, academic, percentage) are filled in correctly.

Step II: Application on the IOCL Recruitment Portal

  1. After successfully applying on the NAPS/NATS portal, candidates must mandatorily visit the IOCL recruitment portal: www.iocrefrecruit.in.
  2. This portal will be open from November 28, 2025 (10:00 AM) to December 18, 2025 (05:00 PM).
  3. Go to the link "Engagement of Apprentices under Refineries Division 2025 (II)" and click on "Detailed advertisement of Paradip Refinery".
  4. Click on the "Click here to Apply Online" link to fill out the online application form.
  5. You will be required to enter the registration number obtained from the NAPS/NATS portal and other details.
  6. Upload your latest color photograph and signature (each less than 50 KB) in jpg format.
  7. Carefully check all the information before final submission, as no changes can be made after submission.
  8. Save a printout of the filled application form for future reference.
Crucial Note: Completing both Step I and Step II is mandatory. Applications where only one step is completed will be considered invalid.

How to Prepare for This Merit-Based Selection

Since there is no written examination, "preparation" for this recruitment means ensuring your application is flawless and you are ready for document verification.

  1. Focus on the Application Process: The two-step application process is the main hurdle. Make sure you complete both steps correctly and well before the deadline. Read the official notification multiple times.
  2. Update and Verify Your NAPS/NATS Profile: Your selection depends entirely on the percentage of marks entered in your profile. Ensure your profile on the NAPS/NATS portal is 100% complete. Accurately enter the marks of all semesters/years and the correct overall percentage. Any discrepancy can lead to the rejection of your application.
  3. Keep All Documents Ready: In case you are shortlisted for document verification, you should have all your original documents organized in a file. Ensure your caste/EWS/NCL certificates are in the prescribed format and are valid.
  4. Calculate Percentage Correctly: If your result is in CGPA/OGPA, know the correct formula to convert it to a percentage as per your university's rules and obtain the necessary conversion certificate if required.
  5. Regularly Check Websites and Email: The list of shortlisted candidates, the date of document verification, and all other updates will be published on the IOCL website (www.iocl.com / www.iocrefrecruit.in). Therefore, keep checking these websites and your registered email regularly.

Important Links

Link Type Link
Download Official Notification Click Here
IOCL Online Application Portal Click Here (Active from 28.11.2025)
NAPS Portal (for Trade Apprentices) https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/
NATS Portal (for Technician Apprentices) https://nats.education.gov.in/

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Question 1: What is the selection process for the IOCL Apprentice recruitment?

There is no written examination for this recruitment. The selection will be made solely through a merit list based on the percentage of marks obtained in your qualifying academic qualification.

Question 2: What is the last date to apply?

The last date to submit the online application on both the IOCL and NAPS/NATS portals is December 18, 2025 (by 05:00 PM).

Question 3: Can final-year students apply?

No. As per the notification, candidates must have the final result of the prescribed qualification as of the date of eligibility calculation (November 30, 2025).

Question 4: Can I apply for more than one trade?

No, a candidate can apply for only one trade/discipline of their choice. Applying for more than one will lead to the cancellation of the candidature.

Question 5: Is this a permanent job?

No, this is an apprenticeship training program with a duration of 12 to 15 months. Upon completion of the training, IOCL is not obligated to offer you permanent employment.

entry.title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2025: 31 Junior Laboratory Assistant Posts Open
entry.content:
IIT Mandi Recruitment 2025: 31 Junior Laboratory Assistant Posts Open

The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, has invited online applications for various non-teaching positions in different schools and departments.

Post Name: Junior Laboratory Assistant (Technical)
Last Date: 06-01-2026
Total Posts: 31

The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Mandi, one of the country's prestigious technical institutions, has released a detailed advertisement (No: IIT Mandi/Recruit./NTS/2025/05) for recruitment to non-teaching positions in its various departments. This recruitment drive is primarily being conducted to fill a total of 31 posts of Junior Laboratory Assistant (Technical). This is an excellent opportunity for candidates who possess technical qualifications such as ITI, Diploma, B.Tech, or B.Sc. and wish to build a career in a premier national institute like IIT.

These positions are spread across various engineering and science departments, including Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Biosciences, and others. The application process is entirely online, and applications are invited from Indian citizens. Each post requires specific educational qualifications and experience, making it a skill-based recruitment. In this article, we will provide you with all the important information related to this recruitment, such as vacancy details, eligibility criteria, application fee, selection process, and the application procedure.

Important Dates

Candidates applying for the IIT Mandi Non-Teaching Recruitment 2025 should take note of the important dates mentioned below. This is a permanent government job, and the location will be IIT Mandi, Kamand, Himachal Pradesh.

Event Date/Details
Online Application Start Date 17-12-2025, 10:00 AM (IST)
Online Application Last Date 06-01-2026, 11:59 PM (IST)
Job Type Government (Autonomous Institute)
Job Location IIT Mandi, Kamand, District Mandi, Himachal Pradesh

Vacancy Details

A total of 31 posts of Junior Laboratory Assistant (Technical) are to be filled through this recruitment drive. The department-wise and category-wise details of the posts are given below:

Post Name (Department) SC ST OBC-NCL PwD EWS UR Total
Civil and Environmental Engineering 01 - - - - 01 02
Civil and Environmental Engineering - Agriculture - - - - - 01 01
Chemical Sciences - - - - - 01 01
Physical Sciences 01 - - - - - 01
Mechanical and Materials Engineering (Materials Science) - - 01 01 - - 02
Mechanical and Materials Engineering (Mechanical) - - - - - 01 01
Computing and Electrical Engineering (Various Depts.) 01 - 02 - - 05 08
Biosciences and Bioengineering - - 01 - - 01 02
Construction and Maintenance (Civil & Electrical) - - - - 01 04 05
Mathematical and Statistical Sciences 01 - - - - - 01
Centre for Continuing Education (CCE) 01 - - - - - 01
Digital and Computing Services (Various Depts.) - - 02 01 - 02 05
Grand Total 05 03 09 02 04 08 31
Note: All posts are in Pay Level-04, and the age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

Application Fee

Candidates will have to pay an application and processing fee:

  • Unreserved/EWS Candidates: ₹ 500/-
  • OBC Candidates: ₹ 400/-
  • SC/ST/Women/PwD/ESM Candidates: ₹ 300/-

Note: SC/ST, Women, PwD, and ESM categories are exempted from the application fee but will have to pay the processing fee. The fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

Eligibility Criteria

Each post requires specific educational qualifications and experience. A general overview is provided below:

Qualification Level Required Experience Relevant Posts (Examples)
ITI (in relevant trade) 05 years of work experience Posts related to Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science Engineering, etc.
Diploma (in relevant engineering, 3-year) 02 years of work experience Posts related to Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Electronics, Biotechnology, etc.
B.Tech/B.E. (in relevant engineering) 01 year of work experience Posts related to Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science Engineering, etc.
B.Sc. (with a minimum of 55% marks) 02 years of work experience Posts related to Agriculture, Chemistry, Physics, Computer Science, etc.

Common Mandatory Qualification for all posts: Knowledge of computer office applications.
Desirable Qualification: For many posts, proficiency in tools or software used in the relevant field (like AutoCAD, CAD, FEA) has been considered desirable. For detailed post-wise qualifications, please refer to the official notification.

Selection Process

The selection process for non-teaching posts at IIT Mandi is likely to include the following stages:

  1. Screening and Shortlisting of Applications: The institute will scrutinize the received applications and shortlist candidates by applying criteria that may be stricter than the minimum eligibility. Candidates with higher qualifications and relevant experience will be given preference.
  2. Written Test / Trade Test: Shortlisted candidates may be called for a written test or a trade test to assess their practical skills in their respective fields. The institute will decide whether to conduct a test based on the circumstances.
  3. Document Verification: Successful candidates in the final stage of the selection process will have to get their original documents verified.

The final decision regarding the selection process will be of the institute and will be binding on all candidates.

Exam Pattern and Syllabus

The official advertisement does not mention a specific pattern or syllabus for the written test or trade test. If a test is conducted, the syllabus will be based entirely on the technical subject of the post.

  • Technical Knowledge: The questions will be of the level of the minimum qualification prescribed for the post (ITI/Diploma/B.Tech/B.Sc.). For example, for a Civil Engineering post, questions may be asked from Building Materials, Surveying, Structural Analysis, etc.
  • Computer Knowledge: Knowledge of computer office applications (like MS Office/Open Office) is essential for all posts, so questions related to this may also be included.

Candidates are advised to regularly check the IIT Mandi website for updates regarding the selection process.

Physical Efficiency Test (PET)

No Physical Efficiency Test (PET) is required for these technical posts.

How to Prepare

Adopt a focused preparation strategy for this recruitment:

  • Strengthen Technical Subjects: Thoroughly revise the syllabus of your educational qualification (ITI/Diploma/Degree). Focus on the fundamental principles and practical applications of your branch.
  • Utilize Practical Experience: Refresh your knowledge related to your work experience. Knowledge of laboratory equipment, software, and procedures will be beneficial for you.
  • Improve Computer Skills: Practice using MS Office (Word, Excel) or Open Office, as it is a common requirement for all posts.
  • Stay Updated: Keep yourself informed about the latest technical developments and innovations in your field.

Best Books for Preparation

Refer to standard textbooks for your respective trade or discipline for preparation:

  • For Engineering Subjects: Standard diploma or degree level books for the respective branch (e.g., R.S. Khurmi for Civil, V.K. Mehta for Electrical).
  • For Science Subjects: Graduate-level textbooks for the respective subject.
  • For Computer Knowledge: 'Computer Awareness' by Arihant Publications or Lucent's Computer.
  • For ITI Trades: Standard books for the respective trade (e.g., Arihant or Nimi publications).

How to Apply

Candidates can apply only through the online mode. The steps to apply are as follows:

  1. Go to the official website of IIT Mandi: www.iitmandi.ac.in.
  2. Go to the 'Careers' or 'Recruitment' section and find the relevant advertisement number (NTS/2025/05).
  3. Click on the given online application link: https://iitmandint.samarth.edu.in/.
  4. Register on the portal and apply for the post for which you are eligible. A separate application must be submitted for each post.
  5. Fill in all the required information in the application form correctly.
  6. Upload scanned copies of the required documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, caste certificate, date of birth proof, etc.).
  7. Pay the application fee online as per your category.
  8. Review all the filled information before finally submitting the application form.
  9. Take a printout of the filled application form for future reference.

Documents Required for Application

Upload scanned copies of the following documents while applying online:

  1. Educational qualification certificates and marksheets (from 10th to the highest degree).
  2. Work experience certificates (issued on the organization's letterhead, mentioning the period of employment, designation, and salary).
  3. Proof of date of birth (10th certificate).
  4. Caste/EWS/PwD certificate (in the format prescribed by the Government of India).
  5. Latest OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) certificate (issued on or after April 1, 2025).
  6. Photograph and signature.

Important Links

Link Type URL
Official Notification Click Here
Apply Online Click Here
Official Website www.iitmandi.ac.in

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Question 1: What is the last date to apply?

Answer: The last date to apply online is January 06, 2026, until 11:59 PM.

Question 2: Can I apply for more than one post?

Answer: Yes, if you are eligible, you can apply for more than one post. However, you will have to fill out a separate application form and pay a separate fee for each post.

Question 3: Is work experience mandatory for all posts?

Answer: Yes, relevant work experience ranging from 1 to 5 years, depending on the educational qualification, is mandatory for all posts mentioned in the advertisement.

Question 4: What will be the selection process?

Answer: The selection process will primarily involve the screening of applications, followed by a written test or trade test, as decided by the institute.

entry.title: BKNMU Recruitment 2025: Non-Teaching & PwD Vacancies Open in Junagadh
entry.content:
BKNMU Recruitment 2025: Non-Teaching & PwD Vacancies Open in Junagadh

Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University invites applications for Junior Clerk, Deputy Registrar, and other administrative posts. Apply online before January 12, 2026.

Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University (BKNMU), Junagadh, a prominent public university in Gujarat, has released two significant recruitment notifications for various non-teaching and administrative positions. The university has invited online applications from eligible Indian nationals for direct recruitment to fill these posts in accordance with the approvals from the Government of Gujarat's Education Department. The first is a **Special Recruitment Drive for Persons with Disabilities (PwD)** for the post of Junior Clerk (Advertisement No. BKNMU/07/2025), while the second is for various non-teaching/administrative positions including Deputy Registrar, Section Officer, and others (Advertisement No. BKNMU/08/2025).

This is a remarkable opportunity for qualified candidates to secure a stable and respected career in the state university system of Gujarat. The positions range from senior administrative roles to clerical and technical support staff, catering to a wide range of qualifications and experiences. The application process is a two-step procedure: candidates must first apply online through the university's official website, www.bknmu.edu.in, and then submit a hard copy of the application with all required documents to the university registrar. The last date for online application is January 12, 2026. This article provides a comprehensive guide to all the essential details of these recruitment drives, including post-wise eligibility, selection process, and how to apply.

Important Points

This recruitment is for permanent government positions in a State Public University located in Junagadh, Gujarat. Key dates and details are as follows:

Particulars Details
Recruiting Organization Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University (BKNMU), Junagadh
Job Type Permanent Government Job (State University)
Job Location Junagadh, Gujarat
Online Application Start Date 22 December 2025
Last Date for Online Application 12 January 2026
Last Date for Hardcopy Submission 17 January 2026 (up to 06:00 PM)

Vacancy Details

The university has announced a total of 9 vacancies across two separate advertisements. The details are as follows:

Advertisement No. BKNMU/07/2025 (Special Drive for PwD)

Post Name Number of Posts Category Pay Level (7th CPC)
Junior Clerk 01 PwD (Blindness, Low Vision) Level 02 (₹19,900 - ₹63,200)

Advertisement No. BKNMU/08/2025 (General Recruitment)

Post Name Number of Posts Category Pay Level (7th CPC)
Deputy Registrar 01 General Level 11 (₹67,700 - ₹2,08,700)
Section Officer 01 General Level 08 (₹44,900 - ₹1,42,400)
PS to Vice-Chancellor 01 General Level 08 (₹44,900 - ₹1,42,400)
Electrical Engineer 01 General Level 07 (₹39,900 - ₹1,26,600)
Store Keeper 01 General Level 05 (₹29,200 - ₹92,300)
Lab Assistant 01 General Level 02 (₹19,900 - ₹63,200)
Junior Clerk 01 General Level 02 (₹19,900 - ₹63,200)
Assistant Librarian 01 General Level 10 (₹57,700 - ₹1,82,400)
Note: Many of these posts will be on a fixed pay for the first five years as per the Government of Gujarat's policy, after which the full pay scale will be applicable. For example, the Junior Clerk will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 26,000/- per month for the first five years.

Application Fee

  • For Unreserved (General) category candidates: ₹1,500/-
  • For candidates belonging to SC, ST, SEBC, and EWS categories: ₹750/-
  • Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwD) are exempted from payment of the prescribed fees.

The fee is payable online. The transaction receipt must be attached with the hard copy of the application. The fee is non-refundable.

Eligibility Criteria

Each post has specific requirements for educational qualifications, experience, and age limits. The upper age limit is counted as on the last date of online submission.

Post Name Eligibility Requirements (Qualification, Experience, Age)
Deputy Registrar Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. Experience: Nine years as an Assistant Professor (Academic Level 10) OR 5 years of administrative experience as an Assistant Registrar or equivalent. Max Age: 45 years.
Section Officer Bachelor's Degree in any discipline. Experience: Five years of administrative experience. Basic knowledge of computer applications is required. Max Age: 42 years.
PS to Vice-Chancellor Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. Experience: Minimum three years of administrative experience, preferably in the office of a Vice-Chancellor/Registrar. Excellent communication and drafting skills required. Max Age: 42 years.
Electrical Engineer Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering OR Diploma in Electrical Engineering with two years of post-qualification experience. Max Age: 35 years.
Store Keeper Bachelor's Degree or equivalent. Experience: Three years' experience of procurement and maintenance of stores. Basic computer knowledge required. Max Age: 40 years.
Lab Assistant Bachelor's Degree in Botany/Microbiology/Zoology. Basic computer knowledge required. Max Age: 35 years.
Junior Clerk Graduation or its equivalent from a UGC recognized university. A certificate of Basic Knowledge of Computer Applications as prescribed by the Government of Gujarat. Max Age: 35 years.
Assistant Librarian Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science with at least 55% marks. Must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC/CSIR or a similar test like SLET/SET. Candidates with a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations are exempted from NET/SET. Max Age: 40 years.

Selection Process

The university reserves the right to short-list candidates and decide the mode of selection. The process may include the following stages:

  1. Shortlisting: The university may shortlist candidates based on merit, aptitude test scores, or written test criteria. For academic posts like Assistant Librarian, shortlisting will be based on the UGC's Academic Performance Indicator (API) score as detailed in Table-3A of the regulations. The shortlisting ratio is typically 1:15.
  2. Written Examination: For posts from Sr. No. 4 to 7 (Electrical Engineer, Store Keeper, Lab Assistant, Junior Clerk), the selection will be based on exam-based merit. The syllabus and exam pattern will be uploaded on the university website.
  3. Interview: For Group A and other senior posts (Deputy Registrar, Section Officer, PS to VC, Assistant Librarian), an interview will be conducted for the shortlisted candidates.
  4. Document Verification: Candidates must produce original testimonials and certificates at the time of the interview or as and when called for verification.

Exam Pattern

For the posts where selection is based on a written exam (e.g., Junior Clerk, Lab Assistant, etc.), the detailed exam pattern and syllabus will be published on the university website, www.bknmu.edu.in. Candidates can expect an objective-type (MCQ) test covering the following general areas:

  • General Knowledge & Current Affairs: With a focus on Gujarat and India.
  • Language Proficiency: Questions on English and Gujarati.
  • Reasoning & Quantitative Aptitude: Basic logical reasoning and numerical ability.
  • Subject-Specific Knowledge: Questions related to the essential qualification of the post (e.g., computer basics, store procedures, lab procedures).

Candidates must regularly visit the university website for updates on the syllabus and exam schedule.

PET

There is no Physical Efficiency Test (PET) or Physical Standard Test (PST) required for any of these non-teaching administrative and technical posts.

How to Prepare

A focused preparation strategy is essential for success in this competitive recruitment process.

  1. Understand the Syllabus: As soon as the syllabus is released on the BKNMU website, analyze it thoroughly to understand the weightage of different topics.
  2. General Subjects Preparation: Prepare for General Knowledge, Reasoning, Aptitude, and languages from standard competitive exam books. Focus on Gujarat-specific GK.
  3. Domain Knowledge: For technical and specialized posts, revise your degree-level subjects in detail. For administrative roles, study university acts, statutes, and general office procedures.
  4. Stay Updated: Keep abreast of current affairs and any updates or corrigenda posted on the university website.

Best Books for Preparation

Here are some recommended resources for your preparation:

  • For General Knowledge: "Lucent's General Knowledge" and a specific book on Gujarat GK.
  • For Aptitude & Reasoning: Books by R.S. Aggarwal are highly recommended.
  • For Computer Knowledge: "Objective Computer Awareness" by Arihant Publications.
  • For Domain-Specific Subjects: Refer to standard textbooks from your respective degree curriculum. For Assistant Librarian, books for UGC-NET Paper-II in Library Science are useful.

How to Apply

The application process involves both online submission and sending a hard copy:

  1. Visit the official BKNMU website www.bknmu.edu.in and find the relevant recruitment advertisement.
  2. Click on the "Apply Online" link, register yourself, and fill out the online application proforma with all your details accurately.
  3. Pay the prescribed application fee online. Only online applications with the required uploaded enclosures will be accepted.
  4. After final submission, take a printout of the application form.
  5. Send two hard copies of the application form along with all self-attested testimonials, certificates, and supporting documents to the university via Courier/In Person/Registered Post/Speed Post. The envelope must reach the following address on or before 17 January 2026, up to 06:00 PM:
    "The Registrar, Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University, Government Polytechnic Campus, Bhakta Kavi Narsinh Mehta University Road, Khadiya, Junagadh-362263"

Documents Needed to Apply

While sending the hard copy, you must attach self-attested copies of all the documents as per the checklist (Annexure-I) provided in the notification. Key documents include:

  1. Duly filled Online Application Form.
  2. Fee Receipt.
  3. Checklist (Annexure-I).
  4. Endorsement by the Employer (Annexure-II), if applicable.
  5. Certificate of Disability (for PwD candidates).
  6. School Leaving Certificate.
  7. Caste Certificate and Non-Creamy Layer Certificate (if applicable).
  8. Mark sheets and certificates for 10th, 12th, Bachelor's, and Master's degrees.
  9. All Experience Certificates (starting from the latest).

Important Links

Link Type Link
Apply Online / Official Website Click Here
Official Notification (Special Drive Pwd) Click Here
Official Notification (General) NON-TEACHING | TEACHING

FAQs

Question 1: What is the last date for submitting the online application?

The last date for submitting the online application is January 12, 2026.

Question 2: Do I need to send a hard copy of the application?

Yes, it is mandatory to send two hard copies of the submitted online application form along with all enclosures to the university. The last date to receive the hard copy is January 17, 2026.

Question 3: Is there any fee exemption for PwD candidates?

Yes, Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwD) are exempted from the payment of the prescribed application fees.

entry.title: BDL Management Trainee Recruitment 2025: Golden Opportunity for 80 Posts with CTC up to ₹15.55 Lakh
entry.content:
BDL Management Trainee Recruitment 2025: Golden Opportunity for 80 Posts with CTC up to ₹15.55 Lakh

Join a premier 'Miniratna Category-I' Defence PSU. Online applications open from December 3 to December 29, 2025.

Post Name: Management Trainee (MT) in Electronics, Mechanical, Electrical, CS, Finance, HR & others
Last Date: 29/12/2025
Total Posts: 80

Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL), a vital pillar in India's defence sector and a 'Miniratna Category-I' Public Sector Enterprise under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, has presented a golden career opportunity for the nation's talented and energetic youth. Under Advertisement No. BDL/C-HR (TA & CP) /2025-4, BDL has released a detailed notification for the recruitment of 80 Management Trainee (MT) posts across various engineering and non-engineering disciplines. This is a prestigious opportunity for young graduates and professionals who wish to contribute to nation-building and strengthening the country's defence technology.

Established in 1970, BDL has been a pioneer in the manufacturing of Anti-Tank Guided Missiles (ATGMs) and has evolved into a vast organization that now produces advanced generation ATGMs, strategic weapons, launchers, underwater weapons, and test equipment. All three wings of the Indian Armed Forces are its primary customers. A career as a Management Trainee at BDL is not only challenging and rewarding but also gives you a direct chance to be involved in building the nation's strategic defence capabilities. This recruitment drive is a gateway for aspiring engineers and management professionals to be a part of India's 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' (Self-reliant India) mission in the defence sector.

Through this recruitment campaign, positions will be filled in critical areas such as Electronics, Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Finance, and Human Resources. Selected candidates will undergo a comprehensive training program, after which they will be permanently appointed in the company as Assistant Managers. This recruitment offers an attractive salary package, excellent career growth, and the pride of serving the nation. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online from December 3, 2025, to December 29, 2025. This comprehensive article will provide you with all the essential information regarding this recruitment.

Recruitment Overview (Important Points)

Here is a concise overview of the key details of this recruitment drive.

ParticularsInformation
Organization NameBharat Dynamics Limited (BDL)
Advertisement NumberBDL/C-HR (TA & CP) /2025-4
Post NameManagement Trainee (MT)
Total Posts80
Job LocationHyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Jhansi, and other locations in India
Application ModeOnline
Application DatesDecember 3, 2025, to December 29, 2025

Vacancy Details and Discipline-wise Breakdown

BDL has announced a total of 80 posts for Management Trainees. These vacancies are divided into various disciplines and categories. Each discipline is crucial for the development and manufacturing of the nation's defence systems. The detailed discipline-wise and category-wise breakdown of vacancies is given in the table below:

Management Trainee (MT) - Discipline-wise Vacancy Details
Sr. No. Post Name (Discipline) Total Posts UR EWS OBC(NCL) SC ST
1.1 MT (Electronics) 32 13 3 7 7 2
1.2 MT (Mechanical) 27 10 3 7 6 1
1.3 MT (Electrical) 6 2 1 2 1 -
1.4 MT (Computer Science) 4 2 - 1 1 -
1.5 MT (Metallurgy) 1 1 - - - -
1.6 MT (Chemical) 1 - - 1 - -
1.7 MT (Civil) 2 1 - 1 - -
1.8 MT (Finance) 5 2 1 1 1 -
1.9 MT (Human Resources) 2 1 - - - 1
Total 80 32 8 20 16 4
Reservation for PwBD Candidates: Out of the total 80 vacancies, 7 vacancies are reserved for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), which will be adjusted category-wise.

Salary and Cost to Company (CTC)

Bharat Dynamics Limited offers a very attractive and competitive salary package to its employees. Candidates selected as Management Trainees will receive a fixed stipend during the training period. Upon successful completion of training, they will be appointed as Assistant Managers in Grade-II and will receive full pay and allowances as per the company's rules.

Description Amount/Scale
Pay Scale (on Confirmation) Rs. 40,000 - 1,40,000/- (IDA Pattern)
Stipend during Training Period Minimum Basic Pay (Rs. 40,000) + applicable Dearness Allowance (DA) + House Rent Allowance (HRA) + 20% of Basic Pay as Perks & Allowances. (DA is 51.8% as of 25.11.2025)
Approximate Average CTC per annum on Confirmation Approx. Rs. 15.55 Lakhs
Other Benefits 33% of Basic Pay as Perks, Performance Related Pay (PRP), Contributory Provident Fund (CPF), Gratuity, Pension, Post-Retirement Medical Benefits, and other facilities as per company policy.

Eligibility Criteria: Educational Qualification & Age Limit

Candidates applying for this recruitment must have a strong academic background in the relevant discipline. All qualifications must be from a recognized university/institute, and the cut-off date for acquiring the qualification is November 25, 2025.

Educational Qualification

Post Name Required Educational Qualification
MT (Electronics / Mechanical / Electrical / Computer Science / Metallurgy / Chemical / Civil) First Class Bachelor's Degree (B.E./B.Tech.) in the respective Engineering discipline or a 5-year Integrated Course.
MT (Finance) Passed Final Examination from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) OR Passed Final Examination from the Institute of Cost & Works Accountants of India (ICWAI) OR First Class MBA / Post Graduate Diploma of 2 years duration in Finance from a Govt. recognized institution.
MT (Human Resources) First Class MBA or equivalent / Post Graduate Diploma / Degree of 2 years duration in HR / PM&IR / Personnel Management / Industrial Relations / Social Science / Social Welfare / Social Work. A Bachelor's Degree in Law (LLB) is desirable.

Meaning of "First Class": 60% aggregate marks for UR/OBC(NCL)/EWS candidates and 55% aggregate marks for SC/ST candidates (only on posts reserved for them).

Age Limit (as on 25.11.2025)

Relaxation in the upper age limit for various categories is provided as per Government of India rules.

Category Max. Age Limit (UR/EWS) OBC(NCL) SC/ST
MT (Engineering Disciplines & HR) 27 years 30 years 32 years
MT (Finance - MBA) 27 years 30 years 32 years
MT (Finance - CA/ICWAI) 28 years 31 years 33 years

Additional Age Relaxation:

  • PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities): Additional 10 years relaxation across all categories.
  • Ex-Servicemen: Up to 5 years relaxation.
  • Jammu & Kashmir Domicile (1980-1989): 5 years relaxation.
Note: The maximum age of any candidate after all relaxations should not exceed 55 years.

Selection Process

The selection process for the post of Management Trainee will be a two-stage process: a Computer Based Online Test (CBoT) and a Personal Interview. The final selection will be based on the candidate's performance in both stages.

  1. Computer Based Online Test (CBoT):
    • Exam Pattern: This test will be of 2 hours duration and will consist of 150 Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs).
      • Part-I: 100 questions on the concerned subject/discipline.
      • Part-II: 50 questions on General Aptitude.
    • Marking Scheme: 1 mark will be awarded for each correct answer.
    • Negative Marking: 0.25 marks will be deducted for each wrong answer.
    • Test Centers: Ahmedabad/Gandhinagar, Bengaluru, Bhopal, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Delhi, Guwahati, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Lucknow, Mumbai, Trivandrum, and Vijayawada.
  2. Personal Interview:
    • Based on the marks obtained in the CBoT, candidates will be shortlisted for an interview in the ratio of 1:10.
    • The minimum qualifying marks for the interview are: 60% for UR/EWS and 50% for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD in the CBoT.
  3. Final Selection:
    • For preparing the final merit list, a weightage of 85% will be given to the CBoT and 15% to the interview.

How to Prepare for the BDL MT Exam

Success in the BDL MT exam requires a well-planned strategy, as it is a competitive national-level examination. Here is a guide to help you prepare effectively.

  1. Understand the Syllabus and Exam Pattern: The first step is to thoroughly understand the exam pattern. 100 marks are dedicated to your technical subject, making it the most critical part of your preparation.
  2. Technical Subject (Part-I):
    • Strengthen the Fundamentals: Revisit the core principles of your engineering or management discipline. Refer to your college notes and standard textbooks.
    • Use GATE/ESE Syllabus: Engineering candidates can follow the syllabus of GATE or ESE for their respective disciplines, as most PSU exams have a similar standard.
    • Practice Extensively: Solve objective questions from previous years' PSU papers and GATE. This will give you an idea of the question types and difficulty level.
  3. General Aptitude (Part-II):
    • This section has 50 questions and can play a crucial role in determining your rank.
    • It typically includes questions on Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, General English, and General Awareness.
    • Practice regularly to improve your speed and accuracy.
  4. Take Mock Tests: A few weeks before the exam, start taking online mock tests regularly. This will help you learn time management and handle the pressure of the exam environment.
  5. Prepare for the Interview:
    • Keep your technical knowledge updated.
    • Read about BDL, its products, achievements, and the latest developments in the defence sector.
    • Work on your personality, communication skills, and problem-solving abilities.

Best Books for Preparation

Here is a list of recommended books for different subjects:

  • For Technical Subjects (Engineering): Standard textbooks from your B.E./B.Tech curriculum. Objective books from Made Easy or ACE Academy. Previous years' GATE/ESE solved papers.
  • For Finance: Study materials from ICAI/ICWAI, "Financial Management" by Prasanna Chandra.
  • For HR: "Human Resource Management" by K. Aswathappa, "Industrial Relations and Labour Laws" by P.C. Tripathi.
  • For General Aptitude:
    • "Quantitative Aptitude for Competitive Examinations" by R.S. Aggarwal.
    • "A Modern Approach to Verbal & Non-Verbal Reasoning" by R.S. Aggarwal.
    • "Objective General English" by S.P. Bakshi.
    • "Lucent's General Knowledge" for general awareness.

How to Apply Online

The application process is entirely online. Candidates must fill out the application form on the official BDL website. Follow the steps below to apply:
