The Jammu & Kashmir Services Selection Board (JKSSB) has issued an advance notification regarding a direct recruitment drive for the Health and Medical Education Department of J&K. Based on an indent received from the department, the board has advertised its intent to fill 239 UT Cadre vacancies. These posts are crucial for strengthening the healthcare infrastructure and services across the Union Territory.

While this initial notice confirms the total number of vacancies and the concerned department, the board is yet to release the detailed notification which will include the specific names of the posts, their individual vacancy breakdown, eligibility criteria, pay scales, and the schedule for the online application process. Candidates are advised to regularly monitor the official JKSSB website for the comprehensive advertisement and the link to apply online.

JKSSB Recruitment 2026 (Important Points)

The following are the key details from the initial notification. The application dates and other specifics will be announced shortly.

Particulars Details
Recruitment Organization Jammu & Kashmir Services Selection Board (JKSSB)
Advertisement Number 01 of 2026
Department Health and Medical Education Department
Cadre UT Cadre
Total Vacancies 239
Application Start Date To Be Announced
Application Last Date To Be Announced
Application Mode Online Only
Job Type Permanent Government Job
Job Location Jammu & Kashmir
Official Website www.jkssb.nic.in

Vacancy Details

The initial notification has announced a total of 239 UT Cadre posts for the Health and Medical Education Department.

Post Name(s) Total Vacancies
Various posts in Health and Medical Education Department 239
Note: The specific names of the posts (e.g., Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Nursing Staff, etc.) and their category-wise breakdown will be provided in the detailed notification to be released by JKSSB.

Application Fee

  • The application fee for different categories will be specified in the detailed official notification. Typically, the fee ranges from ₹400 to ₹550 for JKSSB recruitments.

Eligibility Criteria (Expected)

The post-wise eligibility criteria regarding educational qualifications and age limits will be detailed in the comprehensive notification. However, candidates can expect the following general requirements:

Criteria Expected Details
Educational Qualification This will be post-specific. It may range from 10+2 with a Science background to Diplomas or Bachelor's Degrees in relevant medical or paramedical fields (e.g., B.Sc. Nursing, Diploma in Pharmacy, etc.).
Age Limit The age limit is typically between 18 and 40 years for the Open Merit (OM) category. Age relaxation for reserved categories like SC, ST, RBA, ALC/IB, EWS, and PSP will be applicable as per J&K Government norms.
Domicile Candidate must be a Domicile of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir.

Selection Process (Expected)

The selection process for JKSSB posts is typically based on a written examination.

  1. Written Examination: A Computer Based Test (CBT) or OMR-based objective type examination will be conducted. The marks obtained in this test will be the primary basis for the final merit list.
  2. Document Verification: Candidates who are shortlisted based on their performance in the written test will be called for document verification to confirm their eligibility.

A skill test may be conducted for certain posts if specified in the detailed notification.

Exam Pattern (Expected)

The exact exam pattern and syllabus will be released along with the detailed notification. A general pattern for JKSSB exams for health-related posts often includes:

  • Mode of Exam: Objective Type (MCQ).
  • Negative Marking: Yes, typically 0.25 marks are deducted for each wrong answer.
  • Syllabus: The syllabus usually consists of two parts:
    1. General Section: General English, General Knowledge with special reference to J&K UT, General Science, and Mental Ability.
    2. Subject-Specific Section: Questions based on the essential academic qualification for the specific post (e.g., Pharmacy questions for a Pharmacist post).

PET (Physical Efficiency Test)

There is no Physical Efficiency Test (PET) expected for these Health and Medical Education Department posts.

How to Prepare

Candidates should start their preparation with a focus on general subjects and their core technical/academic field.

  • General Section: Begin by studying General Knowledge with a strong focus on the history, geography, economy, and culture of Jammu & Kashmir. Also, cover basics of English grammar and General Science.
  • Technical Section: Thoroughly revise the subjects from your diploma or degree that are relevant to the expected posts. For example, aspiring pharmacy candidates should revise their D.Pharm/B.Pharm syllabus.
  • Stay Updated: Keep a close watch on the official JKSSB website for the release of the detailed notification and the official syllabus.

Best Books for Preparation

While waiting for the official syllabus, candidates can refer to these standard books.

  • J&K General Knowledge: "Know Your State - Jammu & Kashmir" by Arihant Experts.
  • General English: "Objective General English" by S.P. Bakshi.
  • Technical Subjects: Refer to the standard textbooks from your diploma/degree curriculum.
  • General Science: "Lucent's General Science".

How to Apply

The application process will be entirely online once the portal is activated.

  1. Visit the official JKSSB website: www.jkssb.nic.in.
  2. On the homepage, navigate to the "Apply for Various Posts under Advertisement No. 01 of 2026" link (the link will be active once applications begin).
  3. Register on the portal if you are a new user, or log in with your existing credentials.
  4. Fill out the online application form with accurate personal, academic, and contact details.
  5. Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and other required documents (like Domicile Certificate, Category Certificate).
  6. Pay the application fee online through the integrated payment gateway.
  7. Review the application form carefully before final submission.
  8. Download and print a copy of the submitted application form for your records.

Documents Needed to Apply

Candidates should keep the following documents ready for the online application:

  1. Domicile Certificate of J&K UT.
  2. Recent passport-size photograph and signature.
  3. Valid Email ID and Mobile Number.
  4. All educational qualification certificates and mark sheets.
  5. Category Certificate (SC/ST/RBA/EWS, etc.), if applicable.
  6. Disability certificate, if applicable.

Important Links

Action Link
Official Notification Click Here
Official Website Click Here

(FAQs)

Q1: When will the online application for JKSSB Health Department posts start?

The start and end dates for the online application have not been announced in this initial notice. Candidates must check the official JKSSB website for the detailed notification which will contain the full schedule.

Q2: What are the names of the 239 posts being advertised?

The specific names of the posts have not been disclosed yet. The advertisement only mentions that they are "UT Cadre posts belonging to Health and Medical Education Department". The post-wise breakdown will be available in the full notification.

Q3: Is this recruitment for a specific district or for the entire UT of J&K?

The notification specifies that these are "UT Cadre" posts, which means the selected candidates can be posted anywhere within the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir.

Q4: I am not a domicile of J&K. Can I apply?

No, typically JKSSB recruitments are open only to candidates who are Domiciles of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir. This will be confirmed in the detailed notification.

entry.title: VNIT Nagpur Recruitment 2026 for 45 Non-Academic Posts
entry.content:
VNIT Nagpur Recruitment 2026 for 45 Non-Academic Posts

Advertisement No. 01/2026: The Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT), Nagpur, has announced a major recruitment drive for 45 non-academic posts on a direct recruitment basis. Online applications are invited for a wide range of positions from Group A to Group C, including Librarian, Engineer, Scientific/Technical Officer, Superintendent, and various Assistant/Technician roles. The online application portal will be open from January 24, 2026, to March 01, 2026.

Post Name: Librarian, Executive Engineer, Superintendent, Technical Assistant, Junior Assistant, Technician, and more
Last Date: 01 March 2026
Total Posts: 45

Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT) Nagpur, an Institution of National Importance under the Ministry of Education, has released a comprehensive notification to fill 45 vacancies across its non-academic staff. The institute is seeking bright, dynamic, and qualified Indian Nationals for various Group A, B, and C positions to support its academic and administrative functions. The recruitment drive covers a wide spectrum of roles, from senior leadership positions like Librarian (Pay Level 14) to technical roles like Junior Engineer and Technician, and administrative roles like Superintendent and Junior Assistant.

This is a significant opportunity for individuals seeking a stable and prestigious career in a premier technical institute of India. The selection process varies by post, typically involving a multi-stage process that includes an objective screening test and a skill test/subjective test or an interview. The entire application process is online, and candidates must apply through the designated portal before the closing date of March 01, 2026. VNIT Nagpur encourages applications from women candidates to promote gender balance in its workforce.

VNIT Nagpur Recruitment 2026 (Important Points)

Candidates must carefully review the key dates and details for this multi-post recruitment drive.

Particulars Details
Recruitment Organization Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT), Nagpur
Advertisement Number 01/2026
Total Vacancies 45
Application Start Date 24 January 2026
Application Last Date 01 March 2026 (up to 11:59 PM)
Application Mode Online Only
Job Type Permanent Government Job (Direct Recruitment)
Job Location Nagpur, Maharashtra
Official Website vnit.ac.in

Vacancy, Pay Level, and Group Details

A total of 45 posts have been advertised across 13 different designations, from Group A to Group C.

Post Name Vacancies Pay Level Group
Librarian114A
Senior Scientific / Technical Officer212A
Scientific / Technical Officer310A
Executive Engineer110A
Superintendent56B
Library and Information Assistant1 (#)6B
Junior Engineer16B
Technical Assistant86B
Senior Assistant24C
Senior Technician34C
Junior Assistant33C
Technician10 (#)3C
Office Attendant / Lab Attendant51C
Total45
Note: (#) One post each in the cadre of Library and Information Assistant and Technician is reserved for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) as per Government norms.

Application Fee & Caution Deposit

The fee structure includes a non-refundable application fee and a refundable caution deposit for candidates called for the objective test.

  • For UR, OBC, and EWS candidates:
    • Application Fee: ₹2000 + 18% GST = ₹2360/-
    • Refundable Caution Deposit: ₹1000/-
    • Total Payable: ₹3360/-
  • For SC, ST, PwBD, and Female candidates:
    • Application Fee: NIL
    • Refundable Caution Deposit: ₹1000/-
    • Total Payable: ₹1000/-

The Caution Deposit will be refunded to candidates who appear for the Objective Test and will be forfeited for absentees.

Eligibility Criteria (Post-wise)

Candidates must ensure they meet the specific age and qualification requirements for the post they are applying for.

Post NameMax. Age LimitEssential Qualifications & Experience
Librarian56 yearsMaster's Degree in Library/Information Science (60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) with 10 years of experience as a Deputy Librarian or equivalent.
Senior Scientific / Technical Officer50 yearsB.E./B.Tech./M.Sc./MCA (First Class) with 5 years of relevant experience in Network/System Administration.
Scientific / Technical Officer35 yearsB.E./B.Tech./M.Sc./MCA (First Class). Experience in software development, ERP, and cyber security is required.
Executive Engineer35 yearsFirst Class B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering.
Superintendent30 yearsFirst Class Bachelor's Degree OR Master's Degree (50% marks). Knowledge of computer applications is essential.
Library and Information Assistant30 yearsFirst Class Bachelor's Degree (Science/Arts/Commerce) AND Bachelor's Degree in Library and Information Science.
Junior Engineer30 yearsFirst Class B.E./B.Tech. or First Class Diploma in Electrical Engineering.
Technical Assistant30 yearsFirst Class B.E./B.Tech./MCA OR First Class Diploma in relevant Engg. OR First Class B.Sc. OR M.Sc. (50% marks).
Senior Assistant33 years10+2 with a minimum typing speed of 35 w.p.m. and proficiency in computer word processing and spreadsheet.
Senior Technician33 years10+2 with Science (60% marks) OR 10+2 (50%) with ITI (1 year) OR 10th (60%) with ITI (2 years) OR 3-year Diploma in relevant Engg. field.
Junior Assistant27 years10+2 with a minimum typing speed of 35 w.p.m. and proficiency in computer word processing and spreadsheet.
Technician27 years10+2 with Science (60% marks) OR 10+2 (50%) with ITI (1 year) OR 10th (60%) with ITI (2 years) OR 3-year Diploma in relevant Engg. field.
Office Attendant / Lab Attendant27 years10+2 from a recognized board (for Office Attendant) OR 10+2 in Science from a recognized board (for Lab Attendant).

Selection Process and Exam Pattern

The selection process is tailored to each post. Most posts involve a two-stage process with a screening test and a skill test/subjective test. Negative marking of 0.5 marks for each wrong answer is applicable in all objective tests.

For Group 'A' Posts (Librarian, Officers, EE): The selection will be based on performance in the Interview. However, the institute may conduct an objective/skill test for shortlisting if the number of applicants is large.

For Superintendent & Senior Assistant:

  • Stage I (Screening Test): 100 Objective Questions, 200 Marks, 2 Hours. Syllabus includes General Aptitude (40 Qs) and Domain Knowledge (60 Qs on GoI Rules, Admin, Finance).
  • Stage II (Subjective Test): 100 Marks, 3 Hours. Test of Noting, Drafting, English Language, and Computer Skills. Final merit is based on Stage II.

For Library and Information Assistant, Junior Engineer, Technical Assistant, Senior Technician, Technician:

  • Stage I (Screening Test): 100 Objective Questions, 200 Marks, 2 Hours. Syllabus includes General Aptitude (40 Qs) and specific Domain Knowledge (60 Qs).
  • Stage II (Skill Test): This is a Qualifying ('Go/No-Go') test to assess practical skills. Final merit is based on Stage I marks, subject to qualifying in Stage II.

For Junior Assistant:

  • Stage I (Screening Test): 100 Objective Questions, 200 Marks, 2 Hours. Syllabus includes General Intelligence & Reasoning, QA, GK, Computer Awareness, and English.
  • Stage II (Subjective Test): 100 Marks, 3 Hours. Test of English Language, Noting/Drafting, and a Computer Proficiency/Typing Test. Final merit is based on Stage II.

For Office/Lab Attendant:

  • Single Stage Selection: One Objective Test of 100 questions, 200 Marks, 2 Hours.
  • Syllabus: General Intelligence & Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, General Knowledge & Computer Awareness, and English Language & Comprehension. Final merit is based on this test.

PET (Physical Efficiency Test)

There is no Physical Efficiency Test (PET) or Physical Standard Test (PST) applicable for any of the posts in this recruitment drive.

How to Prepare for the Exams

A focused preparation strategy is essential.

  • Analyze the Syllabus: Each post has a detailed syllabus in the notification. Download the notification and analyze the topics for both the General and Domain sections.
  • Domain Knowledge is Key: For most posts, the domain knowledge section carries more weightage (60% in Stage I). Revise your core subjects from your degree/diploma thoroughly. For administrative posts, study Government of India rules (FR, SR, GFR, CCS Rules).
  • Practice General Aptitude: Regularly practice questions on Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, English, and General Knowledge.
  • Skill Test Preparation: For posts with a qualifying skill test (e.g., typing, technical trade test), start practicing daily to ensure you meet the required standards.

Best Books for Preparation

Candidates can refer to standard academic and competitive exam books.

  • Domain Knowledge (Technical): Refer to standard textbooks and handbooks for your specific engineering/science discipline (e.g., books for GATE preparation).
  • Domain Knowledge (Admin/Finance): "Swamy's Handbook for Central Government Staff" is an essential resource for rules like FR, SR, CCS, etc.
  • General Aptitude: "Quantitative Aptitude" by R.S. Aggarwal, "A Modern Approach to Verbal & Non-Verbal Reasoning" by R.S. Aggarwal, and "Objective General English" by S.P. Bakshi.

How to Apply Online

The application process is entirely online. Follow these steps carefully:

  1. Visit the official VNIT recruitment page at https://vnit.ac.in/recruitment.
  2. Find the link for "Recruitment of Various Non-Academic Posts (Advt. No. 01/2026)" and click on the online application portal link.
  3. Register on the portal by providing your basic details.
  4. Log in with your credentials and fill out the application form with accurate personal, academic, and contact information.
  5. Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and all required documents as per the specified format.
  6. Pay the application fee and caution deposit online.
  7. Review the application thoroughly before final submission. If applying for multiple posts, submit a separate application and fee for each.
  8. Download and save a printout of the final submitted application form for future reference.

Documents Needed to Apply (for Uploading)

Candidates must have scanned copies of the following documents ready before starting the application process:

  1. Recent passport-size photograph and signature.
  2. SSC/10th Standard certificate for proof of date of birth.
  3. All educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (starting from 10th standard onwards).
  4. Experience certificates in the prescribed format.
  5. Category Certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD) as per Government of India format.
  6. No Objection Certificate (NOC) for currently employed candidates (to be produced at the time of document verification).

Important Links

Action Link
Apply Online Click Here
Official Notification Click Here
Official VNIT Website Click Here

(FAQs)

Q1: Is there an application fee for female candidates?

No, there is no application fee for female candidates. However, they are required to pay the refundable caution deposit of ₹1000.

Q2: What is the caution deposit, and will I get it back?

The caution deposit of ₹1000 is mandatory for all candidates called for the Objective Test. It will be refunded to your account after the results are declared, provided you have appeared for the test. It will be forfeited if you are absent.

Q3: Can I apply for more than one post?

Yes, you can apply for multiple posts if you are eligible. However, you must submit a separate application and pay the required fee and caution deposit for each post.

Q4: What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant post?

The selection process for Technical Assistant involves a Stage-I Screening Test (200 marks). Candidates who qualify will then have to appear for a Stage-II Skill Test, which is qualifying in nature. The final merit will be based on the marks from the Stage-I test.

entry.title: GNDU Recruitment 2025: Programmer और Clerk की सरकारी भर्ती
entry.content:
GNDU Recruitment 2025: Programmer और Clerk की सरकारी भर्ती

Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU), Amritsar ने Non-Teaching पदों के लिए आवेदन आमंत्रित किए हैं। ऑनलाइन आवेदन 21 अक्टूबर 2025 से शुरू होंगे।

Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) ने विज्ञापन संख्या 10/2025 के तहत Programmer और Clerk-cum-Junior Data Entry Operator पदों के लिए अधिसूचना जारी की है। आवेदन 21 अक्टूबर 2025 से शुरू होकर 12 नवंबर 2025 तक किए जा सकते हैं। हार्ड कॉपी जमा करने की अंतिम तिथि 20 नवंबर 2025 है।

रिक्तियाँ और वेतन विवरण

पदश्रेणीवेतनमान
ProgrammerSC (Others) – 01
Ex-Servicemen – 01
BC – 01		₹56100-177500 (Level 18)
Clerk-cum-Junior Data Entry OperatorSC (Mazbi Sikh/Balmiki) – 01
SC (Others) – 01		₹19900 (Level 2)
नोट: Programmer पद के लिए वेतनमान 7th CPC के अनुसार संशोधित किया जा सकता है।

शैक्षणिक योग्यता

  • Programmer: M.Tech (CSE/IT) या MCA में न्यूनतम 60% अंक। साथ ही, Matric तक Punjabi विषय अनिवार्य।
  • Clerk-cum-Junior Data Entry Operator:
    • BCA/B.Sc (IT)/B.Sc (Computer Science) 50% अंकों के साथ, या
    • Graduation + PGDCA 50% अंकों के साथ, या
    • B.Tech/BE (किसी भी stream में) जिसमें दो semester Computer Science पढ़ा हो, या
    • Master’s in Computer Science/Applications/IT 50% अंकों के साथ।
    • Matric तक Punjabi अनिवार्य।

चयन प्रक्रिया

  1. Clerk: Written Test और Practical Test लिया जाएगा।
  2. Programmer: Screening के बाद Interview या Counseling आयोजित की जा सकती है।

सिर्फ eligibility पूरी करने से इंटरव्यू के लिए बुलाया जाना निश्चित नहीं है।

आवेदन प्रक्रिया और शुल्क

  1. GNDU की वेबसाइट www.gndu.ac.in पर जाकर ऑनलाइन आवेदन करें।
  2. Photo और Signature (100KB से कम) अपलोड करें।
  3. शुल्क:
    • Programmer – ₹1180 (General/OBC), ₹590 (SC/ST/PWD of Punjab)
    • Clerk – ₹944 (General/OBC), ₹472 (SC/ST/PWD of Punjab)

    Punjab से बाहर के SC/ST/PWD उम्मीदवारों को General category की फीस देनी होगी।

  4. ऑनलाइन आवेदन के बाद उसका प्रिंटआउट लेकर सभी प्रमाणपत्रों की Self-Attested कॉपी के साथ नीचे दिए पते पर भेजें:

पता:
THE REGISTRAR,
Guru Nanak Dev University,
Amritsar – 143005, Punjab

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंकविवरण
Official Websiteयहाँ क्लिक करें
ContactPhone: 0183-2258802-09 (Ext: 3182/3099)

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

Q1: आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि क्या है?

ऑनलाइन आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि 12 नवंबर 2025 है।

Q2: क्या हार्ड कॉपी भेजना जरूरी है?

हाँ, 20 नवंबर 2025 तक हार्ड कॉपी पहुँचना अनिवार्य है।

Q3: आवेदन शुल्क कितना है?

Programmer के लिए ₹1180, Clerk के लिए ₹944 (General Category) है।

Q4: क्या Punjab से बाहर के उम्मीदवारों को आरक्षण मिलेगा?

नहीं, आरक्षण का लाभ केवल Punjab के domicile उम्मीदवारों को मिलेगा।

entry.title: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Recruitment 2026: Various Non-Teaching Posts Open
entry.content:
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Recruitment 2026: Various Non-Teaching Posts Open

Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya (GGU), Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh, has invited online applications for direct recruitment to various non-teaching posts under Group A, B, and C.

Post Name: Deputy Registrar, Assistant Registrar, Clerk, Assistant, etc.
Last Date: 26-01-2026
Total Posts: 09+

Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya (GGU), a prestigious Central University established under the Central Universities Act, 2009, has released a detailed advertisement (Advt. No-6757/Rec/Admn/2025) for recruitment to non-teaching positions. This recruitment drive is being conducted to fill more than 09 posts under various Group A, B, and C categories. This is a golden opportunity for qualified and experienced professionals who wish to be part of the administrative and technical framework of a central university.

This recruitment includes important posts such as Deputy Registrar, Assistant Registrar, Senior Technical Assistant, Upper Division Clerk, Lower Division Clerk, and Laboratory Assistant. The application process will be completed through both online and offline modes. Candidates first need to apply online through the Samarth Portal and then send a hard copy of the application form along with supporting documents to the university's address. In this article, we will provide you with all the important information related to this recruitment, such as vacancy details, eligibility criteria, application fee, selection process, and how to apply.

Important Dates

Candidates applying for the GGU non-teaching recruitment should take note of the important dates mentioned below. This is a permanent government job, and the location will be Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh.

Event Date/Details
Date of Advertisement Publication 13-12-2025
Last Date for Online Application 26-01-2026
Last Date for Sending Hard Copy of Application Within 15 days from the last date of online application
Job Type Government Job (Central University)
Job Location Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh

Vacancy Details

Various posts under Group A, B, and C are to be filled through this recruitment drive. The detailed breakdown of the posts is given below:

Post Name Number of Posts & Category Group Pay Level Age Limit
Deputy Registrar 01 (UR) A Level 12 (78800-209200) 50 years
Deputy Registrar (Leave Vacancy) 01 (UR) A Level 12 (78800-209200) 50 years
Assistant Registrar 01 (OBC) A Level 10 (56100-177500) 40 years
Senior Technical Assistant (ICT) 01 (UR) B Level 6 (35400-112400) 35 years
Upper Division Clerk (UDC) 01 (EWS) C Level 4 (25500-81100) 32 years
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) 01 (UR) C Level 2 (19900-63200) 32 years
Library Assistant 01 (UR) C Level 4 (25500-81100) 32 years
Laboratory Assistant 02 (ST) C Level 4 (25500-81100) 32 years
Note: The number of posts is tentative and may change in the future as per the instructions of MHRD/UGC. Reservation will be applicable as per GOI/UGC rules.

Application Fee

Candidates will have to pay a non-refundable application fee:

  • For Group A posts:
    • General/OBC/EWS candidates: ₹2500/-
    • SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates: ₹1000/-
  • For Group B and C posts:
    • General/OBC/EWS candidates: ₹500/-
    • SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates: Fee Exempted

Special Note: Candidates who had applied for the posts of Deputy Registrar (Leave Vacancy) and Assistant Registrar under the previous advertisement number 205/Rec/Admn/2024 must apply again under this advertisement, but they will not be required to pay the fee again.

Eligibility Criteria

A brief overview of the required educational qualifications and experience for various non-teaching posts at GGU is given below:

Post Name Essential Qualifications and Experience
Deputy Registrar i. Master's Degree with at least 55% marks.
ii. 5 years of experience as an Assistant Registrar or in an equivalent post in Pay Level 10.
Assistant Registrar i. Master's Degree with at least 55% marks.
ii. Selection will be through an All India open competition by written test and interview.
Senior Technical Assistant (ICT) i. B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science/Engineering/Electronics Engineering or M.C.A./M.Sc. in Computer Science.
ii. 2 years of programming experience in languages like C/C++/JAVA, MySQL/ORACLE, PHP.
Upper Division Clerk (UDC) i. A Bachelor's Degree in any discipline.
ii. 2 years of experience as a Lower Division Clerk or equivalent.
iii. English typing speed of 35 w.p.m or Hindi typing speed of 30 w.p.m.
iv. Proficiency in computer operations.
Lower Division Clerk (LDC) i. A Bachelor's Degree in any discipline.
ii. English typing speed of 35 w.p.m or Hindi typing speed of 30 w.p.m.
iii. Proficiency in computer operations.
Library Assistant i. Bachelor's Degree in Library & Information Science or equivalent.
ii. Typing speed of 30 w.p.m in English.
iii. Knowledge of computer applications.
Laboratory Assistant i. Bachelor's Degree in any Science and/or Engineering/Technology discipline.
ii. Minimum of two years of experience in handling and maintaining sophisticated scientific instruments in a laboratory.

Selection Process

The selection process for various posts will be different and may include the following stages:

  1. Shortlisting: The university may shortlist candidates from the received applications by applying criteria stricter than the minimum qualifications. Applicants with higher qualifications and merit will be given preference.
  2. Written Test: A written test may be conducted for many posts, especially for Assistant Registrar, and Group B and C posts.
  3. Skill/Practical Test: For posts like Clerk and Technical Assistant, a typing test or a practical knowledge test may be conducted.
  4. Interview: An interview will be an important part of the selection process for Group A posts and some Group B/C posts.
  5. Document Verification: All selected candidates will have to get their original documents verified before appointment.

The detailed selection scheme for various posts will be as per the Cadre Recruitment Rules available on the university's website.

Exam Pattern and Syllabus

The detailed exam pattern and syllabus for the posts for which a written test will be conducted will be released by the university on its official website. Candidates are advised to regularly check the website for the latest updates. Generally, the exam may include questions on General Knowledge, English, Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, and technical/subject knowledge related to the post.

Physical Efficiency Test (PET)

No Physical Efficiency Test (PET) is required for any of these non-teaching posts.

How to Prepare

Adopt a well-planned strategy for success in this recruitment exam:

  • Understand the Notification: Carefully read the required qualifications and experience for your post.
  • Subject-Specific Preparation: For technical posts, study your degree-level syllabus in depth. For administrative posts, study university administration, finance rules (GFR), and office procedures.
  • Practice Skills: For UDC/LDC/Library Assistant posts, improve your typing speed and practice computer applications (MS Office).
  • Study General Subjects: Also, focus on subjects like General Knowledge, Current Affairs, Logical Reasoning, and the English language.
  • Stay Updated: Regularly visit the university's website to stay informed about exam dates, syllabus, and other updates.

Best Books for Preparation

Selecting the right study material is crucial for good preparation:

  • General Awareness and Reasoning: Books by Arihant Publications or R.S. Aggarwal.
  • English Language: 'Objective General English' by S.P. Bakshi.
  • Computer Knowledge: Lucent's 'Computer' or a book by Pariksha Manthan.
  • Technical/Administrative Subjects: Standard graduate or postgraduate level textbooks in your respective field and handbooks on university administration.

How to Apply

Candidates have to follow a two-step process:

  1. Online Application: First, visit the university's website www.ggu.ac.in and apply online through the Samarth Portal by 26-01-2026. Upload all required documents (educational qualifications, experience certificates, Form-16/ITR, etc.) clearly.
  2. Sending Hard Copy: After submitting the online application, take a printout of the application form. Attach self-attested copies of all supporting documents with this printout and send it by registered/speed post within 15 days of submitting the online application to the following address:
    The Registrar,
    Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya,
    Koni, Bilaspur (Chhattisgarh) - 495009

Note: Candidates who are already employed must send their application through the proper channel and will have to produce a Vigilance Clearance Certificate at the time of the interview.

Documents to be Sent with the Hard Copy

Send self-attested copies of the following documents with the printout of the online application form:

  1. Certificates and marksheets of all educational qualifications (from 10th to the highest degree).
  2. Experience certificates (for each experience, with pay scale and Form-16/ITR).
  3. Caste/EWS/PwD certificate (if applicable).
  4. Identity proof (Aadhaar card, Voter ID, etc.).
  5. Receipt of online fee payment.
  6. Any other relevant documents.

Important Links

Link Type URL
Official Notification Click Here
Apply Online (Samarth Portal) Will be available on the official website
Official Website www.ggu.ac.in

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Question 1: What is the last date to apply?

Answer: The last date to apply online is January 26, 2026. The hard copy of the application must reach within 15 days from the last date of online application.

Question 2: Is the application only online?

Answer: No, you have to first apply online and then send a hard copy of the application form with documents by post. Both steps are mandatory.

Question 3: What is the application fee for Group C posts?

Answer: It is ₹500 for General/OBC/EWS candidates, while there is no fee for SC/ST/PwD and female candidates.

Question 4: Can candidates from outside Chhattisgarh apply?

Answer: Yes, since it is a Central University, eligible citizens from all states of India can apply for these posts.

entry.title: About Us
entry.content:
Sarkari Jobs - Your Trusted Partner for Government Job Dreams

Our Story

Hello friends! Welcome to Sarkari Jobs. This is your most trusted platform for the latest updates on Government Jobs in India. Our goal is to make job information simple, accessible, and reliable for every candidate who is preparing for government examinations.

Our Mission: To empower every job seeker so they can receive accurate, timely, and easy-to-understand information - all in one place.

What Information Do We Provide?

At Sarkari Jobs, we provide you with daily updates on all of the following:

  • Central and State Government Jobs: All the latest recruitments from Central and State Governments.
  • Major Recruitments: Every vacancy related to Banking, Railway, Police, Defence, and Teaching.
  • PSU Jobs: All notifications from Public Sector Undertakings (PSU).
  • Exam Updates: Instant information on exam dates, admit cards, results, and answer keys.

Why Choose Sarkari Jobs?

We understand that among the misinformation spread on the internet, finding accurate and authentic job notifications can be very difficult. That's why our dedicated team verifies every update from official sources such as Employment News, government portals, and recruitment boards before publishing it on our site.

Whether you are a fresh graduate or an experienced professional, Sarkari Jobs is your one-stop platform to stay ahead in your government career journey.

Stay Connected With Us

Stay connected with Sarkari Jobs and don't miss any opportunity that could shape your future.

Contact Us: If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us at sakshya14.20@gmail.com. We would be happy to assist you.
Thank You: Thank you very much for choosing Sarkari Jobs and trusting us. Your support motivates us to provide better service.

entry.title: श्रीरंगम मंदिर भर्ती 2025: मंदिर में 30 से ज़्यादा पदों पर भर्ती, ऑफलाइन आवेदन करें!
entry.content:
श्रीरंगम मंदिर भर्ती 2025: मंदिर में 30 से ज़्यादा पदों पर भर्ती, ऑफलाइन आवेदन करें!

श्री रंगनाथस्वामी मंदिर, तिरुचिरापल्ली ने जूनियर असिस्टेंट, गार्ड, म्यूज़िशियन और अन्य पदों के लिए आवेदन आमंत्रित किए हैं। केवल हिंदू धर्म के उम्मीदवार ही पात्र हैं।

तमिलनाडु के तिरुचिरापल्ली ज़िले में स्थित विश्व प्रसिद्ध श्री रंगनाथस्वामी मंदिर, श्रीरंगम ने विभिन्न पदों पर भर्ती के लिए अधिसूचना जारी की है (F. No. 2235/1434/A1)। इस भर्ती के तहत मंदिर और उसके उप-मंदिरों में खाली पद भरे जाएंगे। यह भर्ती केवल हिंदू धर्म का पालन करने वाले उम्मीदवारों के लिए है। चयन प्रक्रिया इंटरव्यू के आधार पर होगी और आवेदन ऑफलाइन भेजने होंगे।

महत्वपूर्ण तिथियाँ

घटनातिथि
नोटिफिकेशन जारी23 October 2025
आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि25 November 2025 (शाम 5:00 बजे तक)

रिक्तियाँ और वेतन विवरण

पद का नामपदों की संख्यावेतनमान
Junior Assistant10₹18,500 - ₹58,600
Guard (Kurka)2₹15,900 - ₹50,400
Sweeper (Thiruvalagu)4₹15,900 - ₹50,400
Musicians4₹18,500 - ₹58,600
Assistant Elephant Mahout2₹11,600 - ₹36,800
Washerman1₹11,600 - ₹36,800
Sweeper (Sub-Temples)6₹10,000 - ₹31,500
Livestock Maintainer2₹15,900 - ₹50,400

मुख्य पात्रता शर्तें

  • धर्म: केवल हिंदू उम्मीदवार पात्र हैं।
  • भाषा: तमिल पढ़ना और लिखना अनिवार्य है।
  • आयु सीमा: उम्मीदवार की आयु 18 से 45 वर्ष के बीच होनी चाहिए।
  • शैक्षणिक योग्यता:
    • Junior Assistant: 10वीं पास या समकक्ष।
    • Musicians: मान्यता प्राप्त संगीत संस्थान से संबंधित वाद्ययंत्र का प्रमाणपत्र।
    • Assistant Elephant Mahout: हाथियों को प्रशिक्षित और नियंत्रित करने का अनुभव।
    • अन्य पद: तमिल पढ़ना और लिखना आवश्यक।

चयन प्रक्रिया

सभी उम्मीदवारों का चयन केवल इंटरव्यू के आधार पर किया जाएगा। चयनित उम्मीदवारों को उनके आवेदन के आधार पर साक्षात्कार के लिए बुलाया जाएगा और उन्हें सभी मूल दस्तावेज़ साथ लाने होंगे।

आवेदन प्रक्रिया

  1. आधिकारिक वेबसाइट https://srirangamranganathar.hrce.tn.gov.in से फॉर्म डाउनलोड करें।
  2. फॉर्म को तमिल में भरें और पासपोर्ट साइज फोटो लगाएं।
  3. शैक्षणिक और जाति प्रमाणपत्र आदि की Attested Xerox Copies संलग्न करें।
  4. ₹25 का self-addressed stamped envelope भी साथ लगाएं।
  5. लिफाफे पर "Application for the post of _____" लिखें।
  6. आवेदन को नीचे दिए पते पर भेजें ताकि वह 25 November 2025 शाम तक पहुँच जाए।
आवेदन भेजने का पता:
Joint Commissioner / Executive Officer,
Arulmigu Ranganathaswamy Temple,
Srirangam, Tiruchirappalli - 620006
(இணை ஆணையர் / செயல் அலுவலர்,
அருள்மிகு அரங்கநாதசுவாமி திருக்கோயில்,
ஸ்ரீரங்கம், திருச்சிராப்பள்ளி – 620006)

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंक शीर्षकक्रिया
आधिकारिक वेबसाइटयहाँ क्लिक करें
ऑफलाइन आवेदन फॉर्मयहाँ क्लिक करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

Q1: क्या गैर-हिंदू उम्मीदवार आवेदन कर सकते हैं?
नहीं, यह भर्ती केवल हिंदू धर्म के उम्मीदवारों के लिए है।
Q2: आवेदन किस भाषा में भरना होगा?
फॉर्म तमिल भाषा में भरना अनिवार्य है।
Q3: क्या कोई लिखित परीक्षा होगी?
नहीं, चयन केवल इंटरव्यू के आधार पर होगा।
Q4: क्या हर पद के लिए अलग आवेदन करना होगा?
हाँ, प्रत्येक पद के लिए अलग फॉर्म भरना आवश्यक है।

entry.title: IIM Trichy and IIT Dharwad Recruitment 2025: Premium Career Opportunities in Top National Institutes
entry.content:
IIM Trichy and IIT Dharwad Recruitment 2025: Premium Career Opportunities in Top National Institutes

Direct Recruitment and Deputation for Multiple Administrative and Technical Non-Faculty Vacancies - Comprehensive Guide for Aspirants

Post Name: Senior Admin Officer, Assistant Registrar, Junior Assistant, Junior Accountant, Technical Officer
Last Date: December 14/16, 2025
Total Posts: 14 Vacancies (Combined)

The landscape of higher education and research in India is anchored by two pillars: the Indian Institutes of Management (IIMs) and the Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs). These institutions are recognized by the Government of India as "Institutes of National Importance," providing world-class education in management and technology respectively. To maintain their global standards and operational excellence, these institutes require a robust administrative and technical framework. In a significant move, IIM Tiruchirappalli (IIM Trichy) and IIT Dharwad have officially announced their non-faculty recruitment drives for the year 2025. These recruitment cycles aim to fill critical gaps in management, finance, information technology, and engineering departments.

Working at an IIM or IIT is not merely a professional milestone; it is an entry into an elite ecosystem of intellectual growth and national service. The IIM Trichy Recruitment 2025 focuses on strengthening its administrative leadership and support staff with roles such as Senior Administrative Officer (SAO) and Junior Assistants. Simultaneously, the IIT Dharwad Recruitment 2025 is looking for technical experts and administrative officers, offering both direct recruitment and deputation opportunities. Both institutions follow the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) levels, ensuring that selected candidates receive competitive salaries alongside a prestige that few other sectors can provide. The application process for both is conducted online, with deadlines falling in mid-December 2025.

The selection process for these institutes is notoriously rigorous, designed to select candidates who possess not only the required technical qualifications but also the soft skills necessary for a high-performance academic environment. Whether you are an experienced administrative professional with a decade of service or a technical expert in Computer Science Engineering, these notifications provide a definitive path toward a stable and rewarding career. This exhaustive 2000-word guide provides a side-by-side analysis of both recruitments, offering detailed insights into eligibility, category-wise vacancies, examination patterns, and strategic preparation roadmaps to help you secure a position in these top-tier national institutions.

Important Highlights and Recruitment Timeline

Candidates must be highly attentive to the individual timelines of both institutes. While both recruitments are active in late 2024 for 2025 placements, the application portals are separate. It is recommended to register early on the respective Samarth or institutional portals to avoid last-minute technical congestion.

Institute Notification Date Last Date to Apply Application Link
IIM Tiruchirappalli November 2025 December 16, 2025 (05:30 PM) iimtrichy.ac.in
IIT Dharwad November 2025 December 14, 2025 (05:00 PM) iitdh.ac.in
Job Nature Permanent / Direct / Deputation (Central Govt / Autonomous)

IIM Tiruchirappalli Detailed Vacancy Breakdown

IIM Trichy is looking to fill 7 regular non-faculty positions. These roles are essential for the governance of one of India's fast-growing business schools. The vacancies are distributed across various seniority levels as per the 7th Pay Matrix.

Post Designation Total Vacancies Category Distribution Pay Level (7th CPC)
Senior Administrative Officer (SAO) Grade-I 02 UR-1, NC-OBC-1 Level 12 (Basic ₹78,800+)
Senior Administrative Officer (SAO) Grade-II 01 UR-1 Level 11 (Basic ₹67,700+)
Administrative Officer 01 UR-1 Level 10 (Basic ₹56,100+)
Junior Systems Engineer Grade-II 01 UR-1 Level 6 (Basic ₹35,400+)
Junior Assistant (Hindi) 01 UR-1 Level 4 (Basic ₹25,500+)
Junior Accountant 01 EWS-1 Level 4 (Basic ₹25,500+)
IIM Trichy Benefit Package: In addition to the competitive basic pay, employees receive Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Transport Allowance (TA), and medical reimbursement. Senior officers also enjoy professional development perks and a high degree of administrative autonomy within the campus ecosystem.

IIT Dharwad Detailed Vacancy Breakdown

IIT Dharwad, the flagship technical institute in North Karnataka, has announced 7 vacancies for administrative and technical support. A unique feature of this drive is the inclusion of roles available through "Deputation" for currently serving government employees.

Post Designation Vacancies Selection Mode Pay Level (7th CPC)
Assistant Registrar 01 Deputation (2 Years) Level 10 (₹56,100+)
Technical Officer (CCS) 01 Direct Recruitment Level 10 (₹56,100+)
Junior Technical Superintendent (CSE) 02 Direct Recruitment Level 6 (₹35,400+)
Junior Superintendent (Admin) 01 Direct Recruitment Level 6 (₹35,400+)
Junior Superintendent (Security) 01 Direct Recruitment Level 6 (₹35,400+)
Senior Engineer (Civil) 01 Deputation (1 Year) Level 8 (₹47,600+)

Institutional Eligibility Criteria

Both institutes require high academic credentials. For Group A posts, a Master's degree is the standard requirement, while Group B and C posts require Graduation with specific technical or administrative experience.

1. Management and Administration at IIM Trichy

  • Senior Admin Officer Grade-I: Post-graduate degree with a Management degree/diploma (PGD/MBA). Experience: 12 years of relevant experience, with at least 3 years at Level 11 or 6 years at Level 10 in a Govt/Reputed private organization.
  • Administrative Officer: Post-graduate degree + MBA/PGD in Management. Experience: 8 years of relevant experience, with 5 years in a supervisory role.
  • Junior Assistant (Hindi): Graduation in any discipline. Must have proficiency in Hindi typing and English-to-Hindi translation. 4 years of relevant post-qualification experience is mandatory.

2. Technical and Engineering at IIT Dharwad

  • Technical Officer (CCS): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science, IT, or Electronics with 60% marks. Experience: 6 years of technical work (Level 6) or 3 years (Level 7) after the degree.
  • Junior Technical Superintendent (CSE): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science or IT with 55% marks. Experience: 5 years of post-qualification experience in maintaining IT labs or server administration. Master's degree holders get a 2-year experience waiver.
  • Junior Superintendent (Security): Graduation with 5 years of experience in security administration. Ex-servicemen with JCO rank or equivalent are preferred.

Salary Matrix and Statutory Benefits

Selected candidates in these institutes are treated as Central Government employees for the purpose of pay and allowances. The Level 12 basic pay is ₹78,800, which leads to a total gross of over ₹1,30,000 per month in 2025. Level 6 positions (Junior Superintendents) will start with a gross monthly salary of approximately ₹60,000 to ₹65,000.

Allowances and Perks: All permanent employees are covered under the New Pension Scheme (NPS). Institutes provide excellent campus housing (or HRA), LTC for family travel, and Leave encashment facilities. Moreover, children of employees studying in IIT/IIM environments often benefit from the rich educational culture and library access within the campus.

Selection Process and Roadmap

The selection methodology at IIMs and IITs is multi-layered. For Group A posts, the weightage is heavily on professional experience and interviews, whereas Group B and C rely on technical examinations.

  1. Initial Screening: Based on educational marks and length of experience. IIM Trichy and IIT Dharwad often set high academic cut-offs (60%+) even if the notification says 55% as a minimum.
  2. Written Test / CBT: An objective-type exam testing general aptitude, language, and logic. For technical roles, a separate "Technical Subject" paper is conducted.
  3. Skill Test / Trade Test: Mandatory for Junior Assistants (Typing), Accountants (Accounting software/Tally), and Technical Superintendents (Lab troubleshooting). This stage is qualifying in nature.
  4. Personal Interview: Conducted only for Group A posts (Officer level). It evaluates leadership, communication, and situational judgment.

Detailed Exam Pattern and Syllabus

Preparation must be post-specific. While the General Aptitude section is common, the technical section determines the final rank in the merit list.

General Aptitude (40% Weightage): Includes Numerical Ability (Profit & Loss, SI/CI, Algebra), Logical Reasoning (Analogies, Series, Coding), General English (Grammar and Reading Comprehension), and General Awareness (Current events and higher education news).

Technical Knowledge (60% Weightage):

  • Accountant: Financial Accounting, GFR 2017, Income Tax rules, Auditing, and NPS protocols.
  • Technical Officer (CSE): Networking protocols, Server Management, Information Security, and Linux Administration.
  • Administrative Roles: Central Civil Services (CCS) Conduct Rules, Leave Rules, FRSR, and Office Procedures.

Expert Preparation Strategy for IIM and IIT Recruitment

Securing a rank in these institutes requires more than just memorizing facts; it requires professional depth. Follow this expert roadmap to success.

Master the Institutional Landscape: During interviews or descriptive tests, questions are often asked about the history of IIMs/IITs, the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, and the role of autonomous institutes in India's developmental goals. Be thorough with the "IIM Act 2017" or "IIT Act" depending on the institute you apply for.

Focus on General Financial Rules (GFR): For administrative and accounting roles, GFR 2017 is vital. Most questions in the written test for Level 6 and above roles revolve around government procurement, budgeting, and financial accountability. Reading Swamy’s Handbook on GFR is highly recommended.

Technical and Skill Readiness: For IIT technical posts, practice lab Troubleshooting scenarios. IIT Dharwad focuses on the ability to manage high-end computing facilities. For IIM assistants, typing speed and accuracy in Hindi/English should be practiced daily to reach at least 40 WPM to comfortably clear the 35 WPM requirement under exam pressure.

Best Books for Preparation

Quality study material keeps your preparation streamlined. Below are the top recommendations for the 2025 recruitment cycle.

Subject Area Recommended Book List
General Aptitude Quantitative Aptitude and Reasoning Ability by R.S. Aggarwal.
Government Rules Swamy’s Handbook for Central Government Staff (FRSR, Leave, GFR).
General English Objective General English by S.P. Bakshi (Arihant Publications).
Computer Science Objective Computer Science by Dr. Alok Kumar or Gate Handbooks.
Higher Education GK Manorama Yearbook and the official NEP 2020 Document.

How to Apply Online: Step-by-Step Guide

Both institutes use sophisticated online recruitment portals. Follow these steps for an error-free registration process.

  1. Official Portals: For IIM Trichy, visit iimtrichy.ac.in. For IIT Dharwad, visit iitdh.ac.in/announcement.
  2. New Registration: Register with a valid Email ID and Mobile Number. Verify your email via the link sent to your inbox.
  3. Fill the Data: Login and enter academic scores. Ensure you mention your experience in reverse chronological order (current job first).
  4. Upload Scanned Images: Upload your recent passport photo, signature, and all marksheets/experience letters in the specified format (PDF/JPEG).
  5. Fee Payment: Pay the ₹500 fee through the integrated SBI e-collect or Net Banking portal. Save the transaction e-receipt.
  6. Final Submission: Preview the application. For IIM Trichy, no hard copy is needed. For IIT Dharwad deputation posts, ensure you send the NOC through your department.

Application Fee Structure

The application fee is used to cover the administrative costs of the recruitment process. Significant concessions are provided to ensure equal access to all aspirants.

Candidate Category IIM Trichy Fee IIT Dharwad Fee
General (UR) / OBC / EWS ₹500/- ₹500/-
SC / ST / PwBD / Female EXEMPTED (Nil) EXEMPTED (Nil)
Ex-Servicemen EXEMPTED (Nil) EXEMPTED (Nil)

Documents Needed to Apply

Keep these digital scans ready before starting the application to avoid session timeouts on the registration portals.

  1. Identity Proof: Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, or Voter ID.
  2. Age Proof: 10th Standard Passing Certificate or Birth Certificate.
  3. Academic Proof: Graduation and Post-Graduation degrees and all-semester marksheets.
  4. Experience Certificates: Clear proof from current/previous employers on official letterheads specifying the dates, salary, and nature of work.
  5. Category Certificate: Valid SC/ST/NC-OBC/EWS certificate in the Central Government format.
  6. NOC: Essential for candidates currently working in Government, PSU, or Autonomous bodies.

Important Links

Resource Description Official URL Link
IIM Trichy Recruitment Portal Apply at IIM Trichy
IIT Dharwad Announcement Page Apply at IIT Dharwad
Detailed Notification PDF Download PDF

Frequently Asked Questions

Q1: Can I apply for more than one post at IIM Trichy?

Yes, you can apply for multiple posts if you meet the eligibility criteria for each. However, you must fill out a separate application and pay a separate fee for each post category.

Q2: Is private sector experience valid for IIT Dharwad posts?

Yes. For direct recruitment posts at IIT Dharwad, experience from reputed private sector organizations or firms is accepted, provided it is relevant to the requirements of the post. For deputation roles, only government experience is valid.

Q3: What is the age relaxation for OBC candidates?

As per Central Government rules, Non-Creamy Layer (NCL) OBC candidates are eligible for a 3-year relaxation in the upper age limit. SC and ST candidates receive a 5-year relaxation.

Q4: Is there an interview for the Junior Assistant post at IIM Trichy?

No. For Level 4 posts like Junior Assistant and Junior Accountant, selection is based purely on the Written Test merit and qualifying the Skill Test. There is no personal interview for these grades.

Q5: What is the deputation period for Assistant Registrar at IIT Dharwad?

The initial deputation period is for 2 years, which may be extended or terminated as per the requirements of the institute and the consent of the parent department.

Q6: Can final-year students apply for these vacancies?

No. All candidates must possess the completed degree and the required post-qualification experience as of the closing date of the application in mid-December 2025.

entry.title: DTU अपरेंटिस भर्ती 2025: 88 पदों पर ग्रेजुएट और डिप्लोमा ट्रेनी की भर्ती!
entry.content:
DTU अपरेंटिस भर्ती 2025: 88 पदों पर ग्रेजुएट और डिप्लोमा ट्रेनी की भर्ती!

दिल्ली प्रौद्योगिकी विश्वविद्यालय (DTU) ने 2025-26 सत्र के लिए एक वर्ष की अप्रेंटिसशिप ट्रेनिंग हेतु आवेदन आमंत्रित किए हैं। NATS पोर्टल पर रजिस्ट्रेशन अनिवार्य है।

दिल्ली प्रौद्योगिकी विश्वविद्यालय (DTU), जिसे पहले दिल्ली कॉलेज ऑफ इंजीनियरिंग कहा जाता था, ने डिप्लोमा और डिग्री धारक युवाओं के लिए शानदार अवसर प्रदान किया है। DTU ने अपरेंटिस ट्रेनी 2025-26 के लिए विज्ञापन जारी किया है, जिसके तहत विभिन्न इंजीनियरिंग और तकनीकी ट्रेडों में कुल 88 पदों पर भर्ती होगी। यह अप्रेंटिसशिप एक वर्ष की अवधि के लिए होगी और चयनित अभ्यर्थियों को मासिक वजीफा (Stipend) प्रदान किया जाएगा।

महत्वपूर्ण तिथि

घटनातिथि
आवेदन प्राप्त करने की अंतिम तिथि26 अक्टूबर 2025

रिक्ति एवं वजीफा विवरण

इस अप्रेंटिसशिप कार्यक्रम के तहत विभिन्न ट्रेडों में अवसर दिए जाएंगे:

ट्रेड/विभागरिक्तियाँयोग्यतामासिक वजीफा
इलेक्ट्रिकल17ग्रेजुएट/डिप्लोमा इन इलेक्ट्रिकल इंजीनियरिंग₹8000 / ₹9000
इन्फॉर्मेशन टेक्नोलॉजी12ग्रेजुएट/डिप्लोमा इन आईटी/सीएस₹8000 / ₹9000
कंप्यूटर एप्लीकेशन10BCA/MCA/B.Tech₹9000
लाइब्रेरी11डिप्लोमा/स्नातक इन लाइब्रेरी साइंस₹8000 / ₹9000
इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स एवं कम्युनिकेशन (ECE)08डिप्लोमा/डिग्री इन ECE₹8000 / ₹9000
कंप्यूटर सेंटर08ग्रेजुएट (Website/Server/ERP)₹9000
मैकेनिकल05डिप्लोमा इन मैकेनिकल इंजीनियरिंग₹8000
सीएसई04डिप्लोमा इन IT/CS/ECE₹8000
एनवायरनमेंटल इंजीनियरिंग03डिप्लोमा इन सिविल/एनवायरनमेंटल इंजीनियरिंग₹8000
अप्लाइड फिजिक्स/मैथमेटिक्स04B.Sc/M.Sc (PCM) या समकक्ष₹8000 / ₹9000
कुल88--

वजीफा राशि

  • ग्रेजुएट अपरेंटिस: ₹9,000 प्रति माह
  • डिप्लोमा अपरेंटिस: ₹8,000 प्रति माह

पात्रता मानदंड

  • शैक्षणिक योग्यता: संबंधित ट्रेड में आवश्यक डिग्री या डिप्लोमा होना चाहिए (जैसे B.E., B.Tech, B.Sc, BCA, MCA आदि)।
  • NATS पोर्टल रजिस्ट्रेशन: सभी उम्मीदवारों को आवेदन करने से पहले National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) पर www.nats.education.gov.in पर रजिस्ट्रेशन करना अनिवार्य है।
नोट: यह एक वर्ष की ट्रेनिंग है और इसके बाद स्थायी नौकरी का कोई दावा नहीं होगा।

आवेदन प्रक्रिया

  1. NATS पोर्टल पर जाकर पहले रजिस्ट्रेशन करें।
  2. DTU की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट www.dtu.ac.in से आवेदन फॉर्म डाउनलोड करें।
  3. फॉर्म को सही तरीके से भरें और पासपोर्ट फोटो चिपकाएँ।
  4. सभी आवश्यक दस्तावेज़ (शैक्षणिक प्रमाण पत्र, मार्कशीट, NATS रजिस्ट्रेशन प्रूफ आदि) संलग्न करें।
  5. आवेदन पत्र को लिफाफे में रखकर ऊपर बड़े अक्षरों में लिखें – “Application for engagement of Apprentice Trainee applied for [Trade Name]”
  6. फॉर्म को नीचे दिए पते पर अंतिम तिथि से पहले भेजें:

The Section Officer (GA),
Delhi Technological University,
Shahbad Daulatpur, Bawana Road,
Delhi - 110042

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंक शीर्षककार्यवाही
NATS पोर्टल रजिस्ट्रेशनयहाँ क्लिक करें
DTU की आधिकारिक वेबसाइटयहाँ क्लिक करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

प्र.1: क्या यह सरकारी नौकरी है?
नहीं, यह एक वर्ष का प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम है। इसके बाद स्थायी नियुक्ति नहीं होगी।
प्र.2: क्या NATS पोर्टल पर रजिस्ट्रेशन ज़रूरी है?
हाँ, बिना NATS रजिस्ट्रेशन के आवेदन अमान्य होगा।
प्र.3: आवेदन ऑनलाइन करना है या ऑफलाइन?
आवेदन पूरी तरह ऑफलाइन है। फॉर्म को भरकर दिए गए पते पर भेजना होगा।
प्र.4: चयन प्रक्रिया क्या होगी?
चयन योग्यता और इंटरव्यू के आधार पर होगा। इंटरव्यू के समय सभी मूल दस्तावेज़ लाना अनिवार्य है।

entry.title: Maharashtra Police Bharti 2025: Constable, Driver और Bandsman के हजारों पदों पर भर्ती
entry.content:
Maharashtra Police Bharti 2025: Constable, Driver और Bandsman के हजारों पदों पर भर्ती

Maharashtra Rajya Police ने Constable, Driver, Bandsman, Armed Police और Jail Warder के पदों के लिए आवेदन आमंत्रित किए हैं। ऑनलाइन आवेदन 29 अक्टूबर 2025 से शुरू होंगे।

Maharashtra Rajya Police ने Police Bharti 2024-25 के लिए आधिकारिक अधिसूचना जारी की है। इस भर्ती में Police Shipai (Constable), Driver, Bandsman, Armed Police Constable और Prison Constable जैसे पदों पर भर्ती की जाएगी। आवेदन प्रक्रिया 29 अक्टूबर 2025 से शुरू होगी और अंतिम तिथि 30 नवंबर 2025 है।

रिक्तियाँ और शुल्क विवरण

पद का नामGeneral/Open CategoryReserved Category
Police Constable₹450₹350
Driver₹450₹350
Armed Police Constable₹450₹350
Bandsman₹450₹350
Prison Constable₹450₹350
नोट: आवेदन शुल्क non-refundable है।

महत्वपूर्ण तिथियाँ

क्रियातिथि
ऑनलाइन आवेदन शुरू29 अक्टूबर 2025 (शाम 6:00 बजे)
ऑनलाइन आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि30 नवंबर 2025 (रात 12:00 बजे)

योग्यता मानदंड

शैक्षणिक योग्यता:

  • Police Constable / Driver / Armed Police / Prison Constable: 12वीं (HSC) उत्तीर्ण।
  • Bandsman: 10वीं (SSC) उत्तीर्ण।
  • Driver: LMV (Light Motor Vehicle) ड्राइविंग लाइसेंस अनिवार्य।

आयु सीमा (30.11.2025 तक):

  • Open Category: 18 से 28 वर्ष
  • Reserved Category: 18 से 33 वर्ष

शारीरिक मापदंड:

  • पुरुष: ऊंचाई 165 सेमी, छाती 79 सेमी (5 सेमी विस्तार अनिवार्य)
  • महिला: ऊंचाई 155 सेमी

चयन प्रक्रिया

  1. Physical Efficiency Test (50 या 100 अंक): दौड़, स्प्रिंट और गोला फेंक शामिल।
  2. Written Exam (100 Marks): गणित, सामान्य ज्ञान, रीजनिंग और मराठी व्याकरण।
  3. Skill Test: केवल Driver और Bandsman पदों के लिए।
  4. Document Verification: सभी प्रमाणपत्रों की जांच।

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंकविवरण
Online Applyयहाँ क्लिक करें
Official Websiteयहाँ क्लिक करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

Q1: आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि क्या है?

30 नवंबर 2025 तक ऑनलाइन आवेदन किए जा सकते हैं।

Q2: क्या मैं एक से अधिक पदों के लिए आवेदन कर सकता हूँ?

हाँ, आप अधिकतम 5 पदों के लिए आवेदन कर सकते हैं, परंतु हर पद के लिए अलग शुल्क देना होगा।

Q3: आवेदन शुल्क कितना है?

General के लिए ₹450 और Reserved Category के लिए ₹350।

Q4: परीक्षा किस भाषा में होगी?

लिखित परीक्षा मराठी भाषा में आयोजित की जाएगी।

entry.title: UP आंगनवाड़ी भर्ती 2025: 53,000+ पदों पर बंपर भर्ती की उम्मीद!
entry.content:
UP आंगनवाड़ी भर्ती 2025: 53,000+ कार्यकर्त्री व सहायिका पदों पर भर्ती!

12वीं पास महिलाओं के लिए अपने ही गाँव या वार्ड में सरकारी नौकरी का सुनहरा अवसर।

नमस्कार दोस्तों! उत्तर प्रदेश की महिलाओं के लिए रोजगार का एक बड़ा अवसर जल्द ही आने वाला है। बाल विकास सेवा एवं पुष्टाहार विभाग (ICDS), उत्तर प्रदेश द्वारा जल्द ही 53,000 से अधिक पदों पर एक व्यापक आंगनवाड़ी भर्ती 2025 की घोषणा की जा सकती है। इस भर्ती अभियान के अंतर्गत आंगनवाड़ी कार्यकर्त्री, मिनी कार्यकर्त्री, तथा आंगनवाड़ी सहायिका जैसे पदों पर नियुक्तियाँ की जाएँगी।

इस भर्ती की विशेषता यह है कि चयनित महिलाओं को उनके अपने ही ग्राम पंचायत या शहरी वार्ड में तैनात किया जाता है। इस भर्ती के लिए कोई लिखित परीक्षा नहीं होती — चयन 12वीं कक्षा के अंकों पर आधारित मेरिट सूची से किया जाता है।

UP आंगनवाड़ी रिक्तियाँ 2025 (अनुमानित)

उत्तर प्रदेश सरकार ने हाल के वर्षों में आंगनवाड़ी पदों को भरने हेतु बड़े स्तर पर अभियान चलाया है। वर्ष 2025 की भर्ती में भी 53,000 से अधिक पदों की संभावना है। यह भर्ती ज़िला-वार की जाएगी।

पद का नामअनुमानित रिक्तियाँ
आंगनवाड़ी कार्यकर्त्रीकुल मिलाकर 53,000 से अधिक पदों की संभावना है। ज़िला-वार विवरण अधिसूचना के साथ आएगा।
मिनी आंगनवाड़ी कार्यकर्त्री
आंगनवाड़ी सहायिका

UP आंगनवाड़ी वेतनमान (मानदेय) 2025

आंगनवाड़ी पदों पर नियमित वेतन के स्थान पर एक निश्चित मानदेय दिया जाता है। इसके अतिरिक्त, सरकार प्रदर्शन आधारित प्रोत्साहन राशि (Performance Linked Incentive) भी प्रदान करती है। वर्तमान में अनुमानित मानदेय इस प्रकार है:

पदमानदेय (प्रति माह)अन्य लाभ
आंगनवाड़ी कार्यकर्त्री₹7,500 (लगभग)PLI व अन्य सरकारी सुविधाएँ
मिनी आंगनवाड़ी कार्यकर्त्री₹6,000 (लगभग)
आंगनवाड़ी सहायिका₹3,750 (लगभग)

UP आंगनवाड़ी पात्रता मानदंड (अनुमानित)

मानदंडविवरण
निवासमहिला उम्मीदवार उसी Gram Panchayat (ग्रामीण क्षेत्र) या Ward (शहरी क्षेत्र) की निवासी होनी चाहिए।
शैक्षणिक योग्यतामान्यता प्राप्त बोर्ड से 12वीं पास (Intermediate) होना आवश्यक है।
आयु सीमान्यूनतम 18 वर्ष और अधिकतम 35 वर्ष।
लिंगयह भर्ती केवल महिलाओं के लिए है।
वरीयताविधवा, तलाकशुदा और BPL परिवार की महिलाओं को प्राथमिकता दी जाएगी।

महत्वपूर्ण तिथियाँ (संभावित)

घटनातिथि
अधिसूचना जारीजल्द घोषित होगा
ऑनलाइन आवेदन प्रारंभजल्द घोषित होगा
ऑनलाइन आवेदन की अंतिम तिथिजल्द घोषित होगा
आवेदन शुल्क: इस भर्ती के लिए कोई शुल्क नहीं है। आवेदन पूरी तरह निःशुल्क है।

UP आंगनवाड़ी चयन प्रक्रिया 2025

चयन प्रक्रिया पूरी तरह मेरिट आधारित है। कोई लिखित परीक्षा या साक्षात्कार नहीं होगा।

चरणविवरण
चरण 1: ऑनलाइन आवेदननिर्धारित अवधि में आधिकारिक पोर्टल पर आवेदन करें।
चरण 2: मेरिट सूची12वीं कक्षा के अंकों के आधार पर मेरिट सूची बनाई जाएगी। उच्च शिक्षा के लिए अतिरिक्त अंक नहीं दिए जाते।
चरण 3: दस्तावेज़ सत्यापनमेरिट सूची में चयनित उम्मीदवारों को दस्तावेज़ सत्यापन हेतु बुलाया जाएगा।
चरण 4: अंतिम चयनसत्यापन के बाद अंतिम सूची जारी की जाएगी।

आवेदन प्रक्रिया

  1. आधिकारिक वेबसाइट upanganwadibharti.in पर जाएँ।
  2. “Register” पर क्लिक कर मोबाइल नंबर व ईमेल से पंजीकरण करें।
  3. Login कर आवेदन फॉर्म भरें।
  4. जिला, परियोजना, ग्राम पंचायत/वार्ड चुनें।
  5. ज़रूरी दस्तावेज़ अपलोड करें।
  6. फॉर्म का पूर्वावलोकन (Preview) करें।
  7. फाइनल सबमिट करें और प्रिंट निकालें।

आवश्यक दस्तावेज़

  • पासपोर्ट साइज फोटो व हस्ताक्षर की स्कैन कॉपी
  • 12वीं की मार्कशीट व प्रमाणपत्र
  • निवास प्रमाणपत्र
  • जाति प्रमाणपत्र (यदि लागू हो)
  • आय प्रमाणपत्र
  • विधवा/तलाकशुदा प्रमाणपत्र (यदि लागू हो)

महत्वपूर्ण लिंक

लिंक शीर्षककार्यवाही
ऑनलाइन आवेदनयहाँ क्लिक करें (जल्द सक्रिय होगा)
आधिकारिक अधिसूचना PDFयहाँ क्लिक करें (जल्द उपलब्ध होगा)
आधिकारिक ICDS वेबसाइटयहाँ क्लिक करें

अक्सर पूछे जाने वाले प्रश्न (FAQs)

प्रश्न 1: क्या UP आंगनवाड़ी भर्ती के लिए परीक्षा होगी?

नहीं, कोई परीक्षा या साक्षात्कार नहीं होगा। चयन केवल मेरिट सूची से किया जाएगा।

प्रश्न 2: क्या मैं किसी दूसरे गाँव की भर्ती के लिए आवेदन कर सकती हूँ?

नहीं, आप केवल अपने ग्राम पंचायत या वार्ड के लिए ही आवेदन कर सकती हैं।

प्रश्न 3: आवेदन के लिए पात्रता क्या है?

महिला उम्मीदवार, 12वीं पास, 18 से 35 वर्ष आयु सीमा के भीतर, और संबंधित ग्राम पंचायत/वार्ड की निवासी होनी चाहिए।

entry.title: Haryana Police Constable Recruitment 2026
entry.content:
Haryana Police Constable Recruitment 2026

The Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) has released a major recruitment notification (Advt. No. 01/2026) for 5500 Constable posts in the Haryana Police department. This opportunity is for candidates who have qualified the Common Eligibility Test (CET) for Group-C. Online applications will be accepted from January 11, 2026, to January 25, 2026. Get complete details about the vacancy, eligibility, selection process, physical standards, and exam pattern here.

Post Name: Male Constable (General Duty), Female Constable (General Duty), Male Constable (Government Railway Police)
Last Date: 25 January 2026
Total Posts: 5500

The Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) has announced a significant recruitment drive for the youth of Haryana, inviting online applications for the post of Police Constable. Under Advertisement No. 01/2026, a total of 5500 vacancies are to be filled in various wings of the Haryana Police, including General Duty (Male and Female) and Government Railway Police (GRP). This recruitment is part of the CET Phase-II process, meaning only those candidates who have successfully qualified the Group-C Common Eligibility Test are eligible to apply for these coveted positions.

This is a golden opportunity for aspirants looking to build a career in law enforcement and serve the state of Haryana. The online application window is short, opening on January 11, 2026, and closing on January 25, 2026. A key highlight of this recruitment is that no application fee is required, making it accessible for all eligible candidates. The selection process is rigorous, involving a Physical Measurement Test (PMT), Physical Screening Test (PST), a comprehensive Knowledge Test, and additional weightage for NCC certificate holders. This article provides an in-depth analysis of the notification, covering all essential details to guide candidates through the application and selection journey.

Haryana Police Constable Recruitment 2026 (Important Points)

Candidates must pay close attention to the following key dates and details to ensure they do not miss any deadlines. This is a state government job opportunity based in Haryana.

Particulars Details
Recruitment Body Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC)
Department Police Department, Haryana
Advertisement Number 01/2026
Post Names Male Constable (GD), Female Constable (GD), Male Constable (GRP)
Total Vacancies 5,500
Application Start Date 11th January 2026
Application Closing Date 25th January 2026 (till 11:59 PM)
Application Mode Online
Job Type State Government Job
Job Location Haryana
Official Website www.hssc.gov.in

Vacancy Details

The recruitment drive aims to fill 5500 Constable positions. The vacancies are distributed across three categories as detailed below:

Category No. Post Name and Department Total Vacancies
1 4500 Posts of Male Constable (General Duty) 4500
2 600 Posts of Female Constable (General Duty) 600
3 400 Posts of Male Constable (Government Railway Police) 400
Total 5500
Note: The vacancies are further broken down into various reserved and unreserved categories (Gen, DSC, OSC, BCA, BCB, EWS, ESM). Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for the detailed category-wise distribution. Reservation benefits are applicable only for bonafide residents of Haryana.

Application Fee

  • As per the official notification, no fee is required to be deposited by any candidate for applying against any of the advertised posts.

This is a significant relief for all aspirants, ensuring that financial constraints do not hinder anyone from applying for this opportunity.

Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility requirements regarding education, age, and CET qualification. The crucial cut-off date for age determination is January 1, 2026.

Criteria Details
Essential Qualification
  • The candidate must have passed 10+2 (Intermediate) from a recognized education Board/Institution.
  • Must have studied Hindi or Sanskrit as one of the subjects in Matric standard or higher education.
  • No extra weightage will be given for higher educational qualifications.
Age Limit
  • The age limit for all CET Group C qualified candidates is 18 to 25 years as on 01.01.2026.
  • Special Age Consideration: Candidates who applied earlier against Advt. No. 14/2024 will have their age calculated as 18-25 years as on 01.09.2024, as per the withdrawal notice. However, they must apply afresh for this new advertisement.
  • Age Relaxation: An upper age limit relaxation of 5 years is applicable for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes (SC), Backward Class (BCA/BCB), and Economically Weaker Section (EWS) categories, as per government instructions.

Selection Process

The selection process for the Haryana Police Constable is a multi-stage procedure designed to assess the physical and mental aptitude of the candidates. The process is based on the CET policy and HSSC rules. The stages are as follows:

  1. Shortlisting based on CET Score: HSSC will invite a sufficient number of candidates for the next stage based on the merit of their scores in the Common Eligibility Test (CET) for Group-C.
  2. Physical Measurement Test (PMT): The first on-ground test is the PMT, where candidates' height and chest (for males) will be measured. This test is qualifying in nature. Those who do not meet the prescribed standards will be eliminated.
  3. Physical Screening Test (PST): Candidates who clear the PMT will undergo the PST, which is a race to test their physical endurance and fitness. This is also qualifying in nature.
  4. Knowledge Test (Written Examination): Candidates who qualify both PMT and PST will be shortlisted for the main written examination, known as the Knowledge Test. The final merit list will be primarily based on the marks obtained in this test. HSSC will shortlist candidates equal to ten times the number of advertised posts for this stage.
  5. Additional Weightage: Extra marks (up to a maximum of 3) will be awarded to candidates holding an NCC certificate.
  6. Document Verification & Medical Examination: The final recommended candidates will undergo document verification and a medical examination to ascertain their fitness for the role before the final appointment.

Exam Pattern and Syllabus

The Knowledge Test is the cornerstone of the selection process, carrying a weightage of 97%. Candidates must be well-versed with its pattern and syllabus.

Knowledge Test (97% Weightage)

  • Mode of Exam: The examination will be conducted offline (OMR-based).
  • Type of Questions: The paper will consist of objective-type, multiple-choice questions (MCQs).
  • Medium: The question paper will be bilingual (English & Hindi), except for the section testing language proficiency.
  • Marking Scheme: Each question will carry equal marks.
  • Negative Marking: This exam has a unique marking rule.
    • There is no negative marking for a wrong answer.
    • However, if a candidate leaves a question completely un-attempted (i.e., does not fill any of the five provided circles/bubbles), 0.97 marks will be deducted. To avoid this, candidates must fill the fifth bubble if they do not wish to answer a question.
  • Minimum Qualifying Marks:
    • General Category: 50%
    • Reserved Categories: 40% (a concession of 10%)

Syllabus for Knowledge Test (97 Marks)

The test paper will cover a wide range of subjects. The standard of questions will be equivalent to the 10+2 level. The key subjects include:

  • General Studies & General Science: History, Geography, Polity, Economics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology.
  • Current Affairs: National and International events, important appointments, awards, sports, etc.
  • General Reasoning & Mental Aptitude: Analogy, Classification, Series, Coding-Decoding, Blood Relations, Direction Sense, etc.
  • Numerical Ability: Number System, Percentage, Profit & Loss, Simple & Compound Interest, Time & Work, Time & Distance, Average, etc.
  • Agriculture & Animal Husbandry: Basic concepts related to crops, soil, animal breeds, and farming practices in Haryana.
  • Computer Knowledge: A minimum of 10% of the questions will be related to basic computer knowledge (Hardware, Software, MS Office, Internet, etc.).
  • Haryana GK: A significant portion, at least 20% of the questions, will be related to the history, geography, culture, economy, and general knowledge of Haryana.

Additional Weightage (Maximum 3 Marks)

Candidates with an NCC certificate will receive additional marks as follows:

  • NCC 'A' Level Certificate: 01 Mark
  • NCC 'B' Level Certificate: 02 Marks
  • NCC 'C' Level Certificate: 03 Marks

Physical Measurement Test (PMT) & Physical Screening Test (PST)

These are the initial qualifying hurdles that every candidate must clear. The standards are strict and non-negotiable.

Physical Measurement Test (PMT) Details

Gender Category Height Chest (for Males only)
Male General Category 170 cm 83 cm (un-expanded) to 87 cm (expanded)
Reserved Categories 168 cm 81 cm (un-expanded) to 85 cm (expanded)
Female General Category 158 cm Not Applicable
Reserved Categories 156 cm Not Applicable

Note: A minimum chest expansion of 4 cm is mandatory for all male candidates.

Physical Screening Test (PST) Details

Candidate Race Distance Qualifying Time
Male 2.5 Kilometers 12 Minutes
Female 1.0 Kilometer 6 Minutes
Ex-Serviceman 1.0 Kilometer 5 Minutes

Note: The race will be monitored using RFID (Radio Frequency Identification Device) technology to ensure fairness and accuracy.

How to Prepare for Haryana Police Constable Exam

A well-structured preparation plan is essential to succeed in this highly competitive recruitment.

  • Master Haryana GK: With a 20% weightage, this section is a game-changer. Focus on Haryana's history, geography, districts, culture, political structure, and current events.
  • Build a Strong Foundation: Cover the basics of all subjects mentioned in the syllabus, especially General Science, Math, and Reasoning, as they are scoring sections.
  • Computer Literacy is a Must: Dedicate specific time to prepare for the computer section, which has a 10% weightage. Cover topics from basic hardware/software to MS Office and networking.
  • Stay Physically Fit: Do not neglect physical preparation. Start running daily and aim to complete the race well within the qualifying time. Practice helps in building stamina and confidence.
  • Solve Previous Year Papers: Analyze previous HSSC and Haryana Police exam papers to understand the pattern, difficulty level, and types of questions asked.
  • Take Mock Tests: Regularly attempt full-length mock tests under timed conditions. This will help you manage your time effectively and get accustomed to the OMR sheet and the five-bubble system.

Best Books for Preparation

Candidates can refer to these standard books to build a strong foundation for the knowledge test.

  • Haryana GK: "Know Your State - Haryana" by Arihant Publications or any other reputable local publication.
  • General Knowledge: "Lucent's General Knowledge".
  • Numerical Ability: "Quantitative Aptitude for Competitive Examinations" by R.S. Aggarwal.
  • Reasoning: "A Modern Approach to Verbal & Non-Verbal Reasoning" by R.S. Aggarwal.
  • General Science: NCERT textbooks from class 6th to 10th.
  • Computer Knowledge: "Objective Computer Awareness" by Arihant or Lucent.

How to Apply

The application process is entirely online. Only CET-qualified candidates can apply by following these steps:

  1. Visit the official application portal URL: https://adv012026.hryssc.com (The link will become active on 11.01.2026).
  2. Read the instructions carefully before proceeding.
  3. Log in using your CET registration details.
  4. Fill out the application form with accurate personal, educational, and contact details.
  5. Upload all the mandatory documents in the prescribed format and size.
  6. Review your application thoroughly before final submission, as no corrections will be allowed later.
  7. Since there is no application fee, you can directly submit the form after filling in all details and uploading documents.
  8. Take a printout of the final submitted application form for your records. This will be required during document verification.

Documents Needed to Apply

Candidates must keep scanned copies of the following documents ready for uploading:

  1. All educational qualification certificates (Matriculation, 10+2, etc.).
  2. Scanned coloured photograph with a white background, clearly mentioning the candidate's name and the date of the photograph.
  3. Scanned signature of the candidate.
  4. Scanned copy of Aadhar Card.
  5. Haryana Bonafide Resident Certificate (for candidates claiming reservation).
  6. Valid Caste/Category Certificate (BCA, BCB, EWS, DSC, OSC) issued on or after the specified dates mentioned in the notification.
  7. NCC Certificate, if claiming additional weightage.
  8. Ex-Serviceman/ESM dependent certificates, if applicable.
  9. Undertaking as per Annexure-V.

Important Links

Link Description URL
Apply Online Click Here
Official Notification Click Here
Official Website Click Here

FAQs

Q1: Who is eligible to apply for the Haryana Police Constable Recruitment 2026?

Only those candidates who have qualified the Common Eligibility Test (CET) for Group-C posts in Haryana are eligible to apply.

Q2: What is the total number of vacancies?

There are a total of 5500 vacancies, including 4500 for Male Constable (GD), 600 for Female Constable (GD), and 400 for Male Constable (GRP).

Q3: Is there any application fee?

No, the HSSC has waived the application fee for all candidates for this recruitment.

Q4: What is the age limit for this recruitment?

The age limit is 18 to 25 years as of January 1, 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories who are residents of Haryana.

Q5: What is the marking scheme for the Knowledge Test?

The test carries 97% weightage. There is no negative marking for wrong answers, but 0.97 marks will be deducted for each question that is left completely un-attempted (i.e., none of the five bubbles are filled).

entry.title: Terms & Conditions
entry.content:
Terms of Use for Our Website

1. Introduction

Welcome to Sarkari Jobs (sarkarijobs.com). These "Terms and Conditions" govern the use of our website. When you access or use our website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our website.

2. Purpose of Services

Sarkari Jobs is an educational and information portal. We provide information about various government jobs, examinations, admit cards, results, and other related information in India. All our services are for your information and convenience only. We are not a government entity and we are not involved in any recruitment process.

Disclaimer: We make every effort to verify all information from official sources, but we do not guarantee 100% accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any information. Users are requested to carefully read the official notification before applying for any job.

3. Use of Website

You agree to use our website only for lawful purposes. You will not engage in the following activities:

  • Copying, reproducing, or redistributing our website or its content without our written permission.
  • Attempting to breach or tamper with the security of the website.
  • Posting any inappropriate, offensive, or illegal content on the website.
  • Using our website to spread any type of spam, viruses, or malicious code.

4. Intellectual Property Rights

All content available on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and design, is the property of Sarkari Jobs and is protected by copyright law. You may use this content only for your personal, non-commercial purposes.

5. Limitation of Liability

Sarkari Jobs or its team will not be responsible for any direct or indirect loss caused by the use of or reliance on information provided on our website. This includes, but is not limited to: not getting a job, application rejection, or changes in examination dates. The final decision always rests with the official recruiting body.

6. External Links

You may find links to other third-party websites (such as official recruitment portals) on our website. These links are provided solely for your convenience. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or policies of those websites. You use those websites at your own risk.

7. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to change these "Terms and Conditions" at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page and the "Last Updated" date will be modified. Continuing to use the website after changes means you agree to the new terms.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about these terms and conditions, please email us at sakshya14.20@gmail.com.
